clean_body: we need to know your thoughts | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Given this EXCITING new development, we need to confirm whether Pennsylvania Democrats support President Biden’s efforts. | | | | | President Biden knows how important electric vehicles are: President Biden is RIGHT -- electric vehicles are the future, and they’re also a major key to fighting climate change and cleaning up our environment | | | Thank you for taking a minute to share your opinion, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Steve Chabot
subject: My friend needs your help.
body:
Will You Step Up?
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-u/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend,You may be familiar with my friend and colleague Congressman Michael McCaul from Texas, but if not, I wanted to share with you why he's such an important conservative leader in Congress.Michael McCaul is a former prosecutor, a fierce advocate for a strong American military and a critical voice for bold American leadership, that puts the priorities of AMERICAN families first, on the world stage. Michael has been a champion for policies that would secure the southern border and end the Biden Border crisis.As the Republican leader of the Foreign Affairs Committee, Michael is leading the fight to hold China accountable, to stand with our ally Israel in the face of violence and terror and to advance the interests of the American people around the world.**But the radical Left has other ideas. **They want OPEN borders, to undermine the strength of our military and to advance policies that let our adversaries trample on our interests.[**Will you join me right now by contributing just $10 to Michael to show him that here in Ohio, we appreciate the work he is doing down in Texas to keep our nation safe?**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-y/) [SUPPORT MICHAEL MCCAUL](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-j/) [DEFEND AMERICA](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-t/) We have to stand strong behind conservative leaders who are working tirelessly to safeguard America.[**Help me show him immediately that we are standing alongside him in support of the work he 's doing >>> **](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-i/)Thank you, friend. I'm humbled I can call upon you to help join me in supporting Congressman McCaul, and I know he appreciates your contribution.Congressman Steve Chabot [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-d/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-h/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-k/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-o/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tlhlddht-kujkulhluu-b/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tlhlddht-l-n) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: Breaking News: Senate and House reach budget agreement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman
body:
| |

| Friends, Some good news from the State House today!** ** **T****he House and Senate have reached an agreement to pass one of the most conservative, responsible budgets that our state has ever seen**! This budget agreement:
* Reduces our property tax burden by sending $100 million directly back to the taxpayers
* Cuts the BET and BPT for our ailing small businesses and reduces the Rooms and Meals Tax for the first time in decades
* Includes Pro-Life provisions prohibiting abortions after 24 weeks and prohibiting any tax dollars from being used to fund abortion services
* Bans the teaching of racial superiority or inferiority in our classrooms

* Provides needed reforms and oversight over a Governor's Emergency powers

* Phases out the Interest and Dividends tax
* Supports Our Police and helps create safer communities
* Creates Education Savings Accounts to increase school choice
* No income tax, no sales tax, no capital gains tax

We are very proud of the budget that we helped to create and very thankful to our colleagues in the House for their hard work to reach this agreement! Read more about the budget agreement [here](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzEwNDQ5NDIzMDA1MjU5MjU1JmM9czRjOCZlPTE5MjgmYj02Mjg1MzMzMjImZD1lMHMwYTJ0.VMwYPftGCXLFdXaeBmREGLsizM3rT1BanqYTfsVM14w). Thank you, NH Senate Republicans

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friends, Some good news from the State House today! The House and Senate have reached an agreement to pass one of the most conservative, responsible budgets that our state has ever seen! This budget agreement: Reduces our property tax burden by sending $100 million directly back to the taxpayers Cuts the BET and BPT for our ailing small businesses and reduces the Rooms and Meals Tax for the first time in decades Includes Pro-Life provisions prohibiting abortions after 24 weeks and prohibiting any tax dollars from being used to fund abortion services Bans the teaching of racial superiority or inferiority in our classrooms Provides needed reforms and oversight over a Governor's Emergency powers Phases out the Interest and Dividends tax Supports Our Police and helps create safer communities Creates Education Savings Accounts to increase school choice * No income tax, no sales tax, no capital gains tax We are very proud of the budget that we helped to create and very thankful to our colleagues in the House for their hard work to reach this agreement! Read more about the budget agreement . Thank you, NH Senate Republicans | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman | | | NH Senate Republicans PAC | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03302 United States | You received this email because you signed up on our website or at an event.

name: Matt Gaetz (Personal)
subject: Dealing with THREATS from journalists
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NKP01-fUTTZkCsobqKdEsUk2mHFvoH5B0e4VoXhyhV4Q-E2WocL0lUjW7NK-lvYCG4Qnh14Zvoi14AL9nwJlVBU1iooKzQ4ZQkvZLFJlpFs_acdDOzdRdFbbSeTeosK6rcmYjKDeca8QdLa_dF61JV8DJCroVqbwbirnasAICPCn8zwsbKNSKWslld7a9hBo&c=X4iWedbxgAEUDLkdY3Tz0zDtQKw1C1gZluyP9pzcFGEEpj_leHciOw==&ch=p8RlzBDgu3vjhG_p4U0K7o5vWJ_1qZPVARMsZssSFKX-LwLw4KzoFg==)
---
| Peter,
Fake News "journalists" have stooped to a new low in their effort to cancel me.
These partisan hacks are threatening people in order to intimidate them into lying about me for their left-wing hit pieces!
What a disgrace, even for the Fake News media outlets who have no credibility left.
---
| | | [JOIN ME: STOP THE FAKE NEWS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NKP01-fUTTZkCsobqKdEsUk2mHFvoH5B0e4VoXhyhV4Q-E2WocL0lUjW7NK-lvYCG4Qnh14Zvoi14AL9nwJlVBU1iooKzQ4ZQkvZLFJlpFs_acdDOzdRdFbbSeTeosK6rcmYjKDeca8QdLa_dF61JV8DJCroVqbwbirnasAICPCn8zwsbKNSKWslld7a9hBo&c=X4iWedbxgAEUDLkdY3Tz0zDtQKw1C1gZluyP9pzcFGEEpj_leHciOw==&ch=p8RlzBDgu3vjhG_p4U0K7o5vWJ_1qZPVARMsZssSFKX-LwLw4KzoFg==)
---
| These despicable people reached out with a blackmail attempt to try to spread their lies about me, but I won't take it lying down.
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NKP01-fUTTZkCsobqKdEsUk2mHFvoH5B0e4VoXhyhV4Q-E2WocL0lUjW7NK-lvYCG4Qnh14Zvoi14AL9nwJlVBU1iooKzQ4ZQkvZLFJlpFs_acdDOzdRdFbbSeTeosK6rcmYjKDeca8QdLa_dF61JV8DJCroVqbwbirnasAICPCn8zwsbKNSKWslld7a9hBo&c=X4iWedbxgAEUDLkdY3Tz0zDtQKw1C1gZluyP9pzcFGEEpj_leHciOw==&ch=p8RlzBDgu3vjhG_p4U0K7o5vWJ_1qZPVARMsZssSFKX-LwLw4KzoFg==)
---
| | |
---
| It's one thing for the propagandists to come after me \- I know it's simply because I'm effective at blocking their far-left agenda.
But to try to shakedown regular, everyday Americans is beyond the pale!
The lies from these journalists in the past have even led to visits from the FBI - what world are we living in where Deep State bureaucrats are running down rumors from the liberal media?
There's no longer any line between "journalism" and militant, left-wing activism. [Will you help me continue to stand strong against these shameless, Fake News media hacks?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NKP01-fUTTZkCsobqKdEsUk2mHFvoH5B0e4VoXhyhV4Q-E2WocL0lUjW7NK-lvYCG4Qnh14Zvoi14AL9nwJlVBU1iooKzQ4ZQkvZLFJlpFs_acdDOzdRdFbbSeTeosK6rcmYjKDeca8QdLa_dF61JV8DJCroVqbwbirnasAICPCn8zwsbKNSKWslld7a9hBo&c=X4iWedbxgAEUDLkdY3Tz0zDtQKw1C1gZluyP9pzcFGEEpj_leHciOw==&ch=p8RlzBDgu3vjhG_p4U0K7o5vWJ_1qZPVARMsZssSFKX-LwLw4KzoFg==)
---
| | | [JOIN ME: STOP THE FAKE NEWS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NKP01-fUTTZkCsobqKdEsUk2mHFvoH5B0e4VoXhyhV4Q-E2WocL0lUjW7NK-lvYCG4Qnh14Zvoi14AL9nwJlVBU1iooKzQ4ZQkvZLFJlpFs_acdDOzdRdFbbSeTeosK6rcmYjKDeca8QdLa_dF61JV8DJCroVqbwbirnasAICPCn8zwsbKNSKWslld7a9hBo&c=X4iWedbxgAEUDLkdY3Tz0zDtQKw1C1gZluyP9pzcFGEEpj_leHciOw==&ch=p8RlzBDgu3vjhG_p4U0K7o5vWJ_1qZPVARMsZssSFKX-LwLw4KzoFg==)

| Thanks for standing strong,

[**It's time to give Ron Johnson the boot, Peter -- chip in $5 or more right now to help Sarah Godlewski beat him in 2022:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31002628/291295823/1978118503?gpsid=31_130_19446&refcode=em21_210617_Rojo_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210617_Rojo_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmMxMDM4MC0zZGQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWCfuouFT0Hli4waX6hDm_usup_846NCLY2nNxsIxrg=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31002632/291295827/1978118503?gpsid=31_130_19446&refcode=em21_210617_Rojo_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210617_Rojo_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmMxMDM4MC0zZGQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWCfuouFT0Hli4waX6hDm_usup_846NCLY2nNxsIxrg=)

The average cost of childcare in Wisconsin is $12,597 annually -- and in some cases, it costs more to put your kids in daycare for a year than it does to send them off to college. It’s outrageous!

Ron Johnson just doesn't get it -- or he doesn’t even care! Heck, this guy tried to block $1,400 survival checks, pushed to end $300 per week unemployment subsidies, and voted against essential pandemic relief. All while struggling Wisconsin families relied on that extra help just to get by during this crisis.

We need a leader who will fight for our families and ensure they have the support they need. That’s not Ron Johnson -- it's Sarah Godlewski. She’s got what it takes to defeat him and flip this Senate seat, but she’ll need your help along the way.

[**Can Sarah count on your support today? Chip in $5 or more to support our grassroots campaign and help us send Ron Johnson packing. Anything you can give will go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31002636/291295831/1978118503?gpsid=31_130_19446&refcode=em21_210617_Rojo_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210617_Rojo_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmMxMDM4MC0zZGQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWCfuouFT0Hli4waX6hDm_usup_846NCLY2nNxsIxrg=)

name: Shariff Street
subject: History is Happening in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARIF STREET FOR PA
body:
Hello again,

We just wanted to remind you about the history-making nature of Sharif’s campaign to be Pennsylvnaia’s next Senator.

Sharif Street has represented Philadelphia faithfully for years. Now, we need his leadership on the national level, and he can’t get there without you.

Sharif would be the first Muslim Senator ever elected; and he would continue to call out the Conspiracy Caucus while uplifting Pennsylvania’s undervalued voices. Can you chip in $5 to the fight?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?refcode=E9241-20210618-HistoryMaking2-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?refcode=E9241-20210618-HistoryMaking2-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]Thanks for protecting Pennsylvania,

Team Street

----- Forwarded Message -----

Peter,
Pennsylvania is home to historymakers and was foundational in the formation of our country. However, our commonwealth and nation still have work to do in creating equal opportunity for all.
That’s why I’m asking you to help me in my pursuit to become the first Muslim Senator ever elected and the 10th Black Senator elected in 140 years.
I already made history by becoming one of the first lawmakers to advocate for key issues like cannabis legalization and reforming our criminal justice system.
With your support, we can do that once again on a national level. Help me in my fight to be Pennsylvania’s next Senator by chipping in $20 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?refcode=E9241-20210618-HistoryMaking2-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$5 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E9240-20210617-HistoryMaking1-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5] $15 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E9240-20210617-HistoryMaking1-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=15]
$25 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E9240-20210617-HistoryMaking1-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25] $50 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E9240-20210617-HistoryMaking1-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=50]
$100 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E9240-20210617-HistoryMaking1-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=100] Other → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E9240-20210617-HistoryMaking1-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=other]
Being raised in Philly, I saw firsthand the hardships of poverty and ineffective policy. I helped create one of the first green city initiatives, and continue to advocate for underserved communities across Pennsylvania.
Not only will I lift up voices that are often overlooked, but I will fight for all Pennsylvania residents. From Philly to Pittsburgh, rural country or urban city, I will prioritize Pennsylvanians in our nation’s Capitol - but I can’t do it without you.
That’s why I’m reaching out, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?refcode=E9241-20210618-HistoryMaking2-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5] Peter: history can’t be made without you. Can you chip in $10 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/SSPA-ALL-Email-June2021-FR-June?refcode=E9241-20210618-HistoryMaking2-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]
Together, we can protect Pennsylvanians by fighting for reform and justice at the national level. With people like you, Pennsylvania will see a progressive and prosperous future.
Thank you for making history happen,
Shariff Street
https://www.facebook.com/StreetforPA [https://www.facebook.com/StreetforPA] https://twitter.com/StreetForPA [https://twitter.com/StreetForPA] https://www.instagram.com/streetforpa/ [https://www.instagram.com/streetforpa/]
Senator Sharif Street has assembled an Exploratory Committee comprised of over 100 leaders from across the Commonwealth representing a diversity of experiences to help him develop a winning policy agenda that'll flip Pennsylvania's Senate seat from red-to-blue! We need you as a part of this movement [https://streetforpa.com/] , but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to receive only our most important emails here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/z55jZouWgEqRv5o5lYfupw2] or you can unsubscribe at the link here unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5f1f3df4-02cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/e642b815-43d0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjQyYjgxNS00M2QwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9wl06aT4jLtTiolKhavQiCoKdOXXdV0bJl-fSTmeH_A=&id=117874703 .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sspa-all-email-june2021-fr-june?refcode=E9241-20210618-HistoryMaking2-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sspa-all-email-june2021-fr-june?refcode=E9241-20210618-HistoryMaking2-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sspa-all-email-june2021-fr-june?refcode=E9241-20210618-HistoryMaking2-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA]
Sharif is the son of John Street, a hotdog vendor who became Mayor of Philadelphia, and Helen Street-Mosee, a retired school teacher. They raised him and his 3 siblings in North Philadelphia where he now lives with his wife, April. Will you help him make history by pitching in a donation to his exploratory committee today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sspa-all-email-june2021-fr-june?refcode=E9241-20210618-HistoryMaking2-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA]

name: Team Franchot Digital
subject: One way you can keep in touch with us
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
Since the start of the pandemic, our social media pages have been crucial in allowing us to keep in touch with our grassroots supporters. Now, as we fight to elect Peter Franchot as our next Governor, they’re going to be more important than ever in our strategy to build a people-powered movement to secure a brighter and stronger future for Maryland’s communities.
We have a lot planned in the coming weeks and months, and we want to make sure that you never miss an update. Will you like our page on Twitter to receive the latest updates from our campaign? [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot]
Our Twitter page is followed by thousands of Marylanders from all corners of the state, and every day there’s an interesting conversation going on about the kitchen-table issues affecting our working families. Twitter also provides you with an opportunity to share your thoughts and opinions directly with Peter!
After you like our Twitter page, we’d appreciate it if you told your friends, family and neighbors to like it too. We’re building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government, and everyone's invited! With your help, we’re going to build the critical mass of online supporters that we need to secure a better future for Maryland in 2022.
Make sure you stay in the loop on our latest updates and announcements. Click here to like our Twitter page. [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot]
Stay connected,
Team Franchot Digital
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em061821]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ce5e69ba-bcce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/2b149bde-45d0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjE0OWJkZS00NWQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V6XZbDfFk_eeBu90oIjiXYkjeTa3kpXyNvpeYLyWDFY=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Team Fitzgerald
subject: Making America WEAK.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Are Biden's foreign policy blunders setting America back? When Joe Biden faced off with Vladmir Putin this week, [it could have been a moment for American strength](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muhtyyd-ahkdjtlkr-r/).Instead, the headlines were about everything other than American Strength -- Joe Biden calling on pre-selected reporters, then yelling at a reporter, then apologizing to the press.We need to make America STRONG again, AND IT CAN'T WAIT UNTIL 2024. [Will you help IMMEDIATELY?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muhtyyd-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [[ JOIN CONGRESSMAN FITZGERALD ] - Make America Strong Again](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muhtyyd-ahkdjtlkr-j/) **Joe Biden refusing to take on China.****Radical Democrats refusing to back Israel.****Kamala Harris refusing to travel to the border she's supposed to be in charge of.** THAT'S the kind of foreign policy that's making America **WEAK**. **This can't wait until 2024. This list of failure - _with much more to come_ - is exactly why we need to TAKE BACK CONGRESS IMMEDIATELY, and salvage the next two years before we can take back the presidency!**[Please, click here immediately to support Congressman Fitzgerald and FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' failures, and take back the majority next year!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muhtyyd-ahkdjtlkr-t/)-Team Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muhtyyd-ahkdjtlkr-i/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muhtyyd-ahkdjtlkr-k/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-muhtyyd-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-u) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-muhtyyd-ahkdjtlkr-o/)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Keep Florida Free
body:
Thank you for supporting our efforts.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wb0YQY02CpiAOvFU5UlRDtNxr8rgj9mQ5fhgW7UPmnoxJneASlDqpAK9T-REHIOYhDh-kUcvEjyVpuWpRT4OQg5y3yUnT1gkH4zD2in9hGAwa9GyrabwvRJUyqaaVZcA-e4TRWeTuRaK-c4Wq710OA==&c=L42EvNF2Dm3Ui-3eThCBX68PhaRg49W1QGHyjuDDN2qfnrfetTxz5Q==&ch=KPmsi70lAPrD8DXenyXUtZdYdqWxsxaM36M0IuHFJaB4v6pfYItfVA==)

| Dear Peter,
Thank you for supporting our efforts to keep Florida free. By joining our team, you are helping us defend our constitutional republic.
Contrary to "the science," the radical left and the liberal media have been on a crusade to destroy lives by adhering to their political ideology rather than the evidence and truth.
From the onset of this pandemic, I stood STRONG for the people of Florida by rejecting their narrative and holding true to my constitutional oath that preserved limited government and liberty for our residents.
I took hits from every political opportunist and corporate media entity who wanted to use this pandemic to destroy me and create more power for themselves.
In Florida, we lifted people up, we didn't lock people down, and the results speak for themselves...
I encourage you to get involved in this upcoming election. The future of our state and our nation is on the line.
We need to send a message that Florida is free, we're open for business, and our people are happy.
With a resounding victory in 2022, we will reject the left's attempted takeover of America and we will solidify a prosperous future for Florida.
[Please CLICK HERE to see how your support has been essential to our efforts!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wb0YQY02CpiAOvFU5UlRDtNxr8rgj9mQ5fhgW7UPmnoxJneASlDqpJ1avHSs95rMChWrxygfraQORPd6PC7vgSJVGabpbLXSN96GaIgcCcO97XEz9J0yoEgNkxXUxOIZn1UMMeU7L9l-iu1aZvHlsU409__v7AEl&c=L42EvNF2Dm3Ui-3eThCBX68PhaRg49W1QGHyjuDDN2qfnrfetTxz5Q==&ch=KPmsi70lAPrD8DXenyXUtZdYdqWxsxaM36M0IuHFJaB4v6pfYItfVA==)
Thank you for your support and just know, I have only begun to fight!
Sincerely,
---

---
Proud Virginians, Thank you for being a part of our campaign. We are winning the hearts and minds of Virginians across the Commonwealth. Recent polls have us tied with Terry McAuliffe. And we are just getting started! We know it will take a new kind of leader and a new kind of campaign to change the tide in Virginia. Glenn needs your help spreading his message across Virginia, uniting our party, holding Democrats accountable, and winning over independents. In the weeks and months to come, we will need grassroots volunteers like you to organize and lead our local efforts to bring new voters to the Republican party. Here is how to join the winning team:
---
| [ **CLICK HERE to Become a Precinct Captain** ](https://hk.t.hubspotemail.net/e2t/tc/VVX0Q396ZD8PW3nyGFR2KtzCrW4Rs6st4sZS11N3Bm-7Q3lGn5V1-WJV7CgD_1W1Z21Yg7CCyCxW7cf_d3896pzYW564ZVh2_P8lbF6WTn5LbD8wW2lYXr47w3FXwN1KT8b6rvk-2W5RBjry5c0WXFW6F4DL-3mqQ1mV-cPcV16wlgNW7XX-Kf6BjwQCW2z2Nyf73Ksm2N3vZ_Mc-nbvjW5nXvzM12XFjHW5qfHW357MsdfVxQBJs2V1y06W7CRWlq7S9gKmVv8FZz6m8Q16W8tF24H8VCMWDW97kbNv4QctcHW5wvjGj4XcMP7W47BMpN6RC-QYW7rZ4Wv8b7DPhW8sBM9W8Y223YW30HDsH5RMPh436vJ1)
---
Precinct captains are the tip of the spear as we talk to voters about Glenn's mission to make Virginia the best place to live, work and raise a family.
* As a community leader, you will drive the conversation in your neighborhood
* You will engage in neighbor-to-neighbor contact to expand our grassroots movement and recruit new volunteers
* And forward information to your friends, neighbors, and family about Glenn's vision for Virginia and encourage them to vote for Glenn this fall

---
---
Please join us out on the trail as a volunteer or Precinct Captain as we fight to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Thank you! Onward to Victory, Team Youngkin
---
Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate.
---
Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116 [Unsubscribe](https://hs-9291217.s.hubspotemail.net/hs/manage-preferences/unsubscribe-all?d=Vnd69Z55H6bgVMdLpS3T0vFpW4ckpnd3P3Q7wW3ZsjYm3_fQ5sN76PHy0mWcMsW5fj5cS51SWMSV25zsR7ZBQWwW67kBkz8hbSd1N5W1yZc1yf0NW314CKX7XX6YGW46TC0t5pQ7zxf3R1VgH53&v=3&utm_source=hs_email&utm_medium=email&utm_content=134213511&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-9Uxu1QGY8ItehIndLjbBCBpUamw6bumpabghRlvZtwECKvI4nN0oVFHHkNkdTqA9NddDkxaO8VcD7yG-oizEO465I99Q&_hsmi=134213511) [Manage preferences](https://hs-9291217.s.hubspotemail.net/hs/manage-preferences/unsubscribe?d=Vnd69Z55H6bgVMdLpS3T0vFpW4ckpnd3P3Q7wW3ZsjYm3_fQ5sN76PHy0mWcMsW5fj5cS51SWMSV25zsR7ZBQWwW67kBkz8hbSd1N5W1yZc1yf0NW314CKX7XX6YGW46TC0t5pQ7zxf3R1VgH53&v=3&utm_source=hs_email&utm_medium=email&utm_content=134213511&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-9Uxu1QGY8ItehIndLjbBCBpUamw6bumpabghRlvZtwECKvI4nN0oVFHHkNkdTqA9NddDkxaO8VcD7yG-oizEO465I99Q&_hsmi=134213511)

subject: Sign the Petition: Matt Gaetz Must be Removed from Justice Committee
body:
Matt Gaetz is being investigated by the Justice Department, all while sitting on the House Judiciary Committee. That means he has oversight of the very department investigating him for crimes -- this is a HUGE PROBLEM!!
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [SIGN THE LETTER: DEMAND KEVIN MCCARTHY REMOVE MATT GAETZ FROM JUSTICE COMMITTEE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td82071b6-30d2-48aa-96e0-7caa3a28ca7e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: We can't take it with a grain of salt

Team Maggie

_Summer heat getting you down?_
_Beat the heat by chilling out at some of our very special live trainings this week._
_Don’t worry, we’ll get the AC._ 🧊🧊👶

* * *

**1.[How to Build Your Email Fundraising List](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoic3Fub25zc3J6enl3emVsMDhhbWwiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vaE9yQ3JJVGNRZC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE4MjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)
Tuesday, June 22, 1pm ET**
Fundraising is one of the most important parts of a campaign, and email is a key way to reach supporters. So why not combine the two?
Stop by Tuesday’s training to learn how to write _really_ effective fundraising emails!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoic3Fub25zc3J6enl3emVsMDhhbWwiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vUEhScXdZQ0VhTy9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE4MjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

* * *

**2.[How to Build Your Political Campaign Field Plan](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoic3Fub25zc3J6enl3emVsMDhhbWwiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vRlNONmdYVXhwaC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE4MjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)**
**Tuesday, June 22, 8pm ET**
On Tuesday evening, join us to hear from campaign experts about the ins and outs of a good field plan.
Heard of our brand new [**Democratic Strategy Institute Field Director Program?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoic3Fub25zc3J6enl3emVsMDhhbWwiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vZTg1VDNyczVNNC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE4MjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)
This training is an _excellent_ preview of what DSI is all about! If you’re considering [**applying to DSI**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoic3Fub25zc3J6enl3emVsMDhhbWwiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vbW90eUlSY1hTUC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE4MjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)**,** then stop by Tuesday’s training to get a preview of life in field leadership!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoic3Fub25zc3J6enl3emVsMDhhbWwiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vWjNBTzY3cEpTUC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE4MjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

* * *

**3.[How to Build Your Political Campaign Fundraising Plan](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoic3Fub25zc3J6enl3emVsMDhhbWwiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vRkl0R3p6YXdxay9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE4MjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)
Wednesday, June 23, 1pm ET**
Fundraising can seem like an artform at times. Luckily, it is an artform that YOU can learn!
At Wednesday’s training, we will discuss why fundraising plans are so crucial, and how to build and implement your own plan!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoic3Fub25zc3J6enl3emVsMDhhbWwiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vRW5weFVhWGxLdS9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjE4MjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

* * *

**Wednesday, June 23, 8pm ET**

name: Erica Smith
subject: This is what growing up Black in the South was like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith.
#
Hi there, it’s Erica.
Making the hard ask for financial support for our campaign is never _not_ uncomfortable.
**So I wanted to tell you more about who I am,[_before I respectfully ask you to make a donation to our scrappy, unapologetic, AWESOME campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina._](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2861?refcode=em20210618-178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=178%2E3698%2E8DlQM3)**
**I’m Erica Smith.** I’m an engineer, educator, minister, and three-term state senator. Growing up Black in the South was difficult. But our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith.
I was raised on a dirt road in rural North Carolina — the same dirt road that my mother was raised on. My five siblings and I grew up picking cucumbers and corn on the family farm. Now it’s 2021, and **my mother still lives on the same dirt road, waiting for it to be paved.**
In fact, here I am standing on that dirt road just the other day.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2861?refcode=em20210618-178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=178%2E3698%2E8DlQM3)
All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting on their roads to be paved. We are waiting for affordable health care, waiting for a living wage, and waiting for a representative who understands what it means to struggle, and who will fight for transformative change.
We can be that change, y'all. I’m running for U.S. Senate to create opportunities for communities like mine. **Together we can win a living wage, a Green New Deal, guaranteed single-payer health care, and so much more.**
If elected, I will fight like hell for North Carolina — and I’d be the first Black woman to ever represent the state in the Senate.
[**_If you’re with me, will you please make your very first donation of $5 to our campaign for U.S. Senate? By donating, you’re taking a personal stake in our historic, progressive campaign for U.S. Senate._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2861?refcode=em20210618-178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=178%2E3698%2E8DlQM3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2861?refcode=em20210618-178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=178%2E3698%2E8DlQM3)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210618-178-footer&t=23&refcode2=178_3698_8DlQM3&akid=178%2E3698%2E8DlQM3)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=178%2E3698%2E8DlQM3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=178%2E3698%2E8DlQM3)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Val Demings
subject: I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31012617/291327131/-74008005?refcode=20210618_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2RmNWI1OC00ZWQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ccx7z67wCf-wvAbzj76YUYU5SLNuav9yR0DZzEdoEl0=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. We're barely out of the gate, and election experts are already calling this a top battleground race for the Senate. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the first donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31012618/291327132/-74008005?refcode=20210618_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2RmNWI1OC00ZWQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ccx7z67wCf-wvAbzj76YUYU5SLNuav9yR0DZzEdoEl0=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. Will you split a contribution of $20 or more to Serve America and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31012619/291327133/-74008005?refcode=20210618_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2RmNWI1OC00ZWQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ccx7z67wCf-wvAbzj76YUYU5SLNuav9yR0DZzEdoEl0=) In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, the very first ones of this race, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?** [**Split a contribution between Serve America and me of $20 or more right now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31012620/291327134/-74008005?refcode=20210618_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2RmNWI1OC00ZWQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ccx7z67wCf-wvAbzj76YUYU5SLNuav9yR0DZzEdoEl0=) From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings clean_body: | | | = Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. We're barely out of the gate, and election experts are already calling this a top battleground race for the Senate. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: I cannot win this without you. = Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine. The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. = In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: 6,112 donations, the very first ones of this race, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend? = From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: the story behind my tattoos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m going to tell you about my tattoos, Peter.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210618-1762-header&t=1&akid=1762%2E434096%2EidNn4t)
Peter,
We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe that’s why my tattoos are *literally* the first thing people Google about me.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20268?refcode=em20210618-1762&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1762%2E434096%2EidNn4t)
Well enough Googling. Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself, Peter.
**On my left arm I have the zip code 15104.** That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania, my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 15 years. Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20268?refcode=em20210618-1762&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1762%2E434096%2EidNn4t)
**On my right arm I have nine different dates.** These are the dates when people were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as mayor, starting in 2005. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to get one more date added because in June of 2018, there was another tragic loss of life.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20268?refcode=em20210618-1762&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=1762%2E434096%2EidNn4t)
My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had been robbed and killed by gun violence.
**Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world, Peter.** In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to go through.
In my 15 years as mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I helped initiate youth and art programs for the students of our community and we worked together to create a community center.
We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off, kick-started our economy, and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment as Mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss of life due to gun violence.
**Peter, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I believe that every community is worth fighting for.** And I *promise* that I will fight for you and your community in the Senate as if it were my own.
But in order to build the kind of campaign that can win, we need to raise *a lot* of money. A big part of that is people like you chipping in. With our Q2 fundraising deadline just around the corner, I have to ask:
[Will you please make your very first $5 donation to our campaign right now, Peter? Every dollar helps send me to the U.S. Senate where I’ll fight like hell for your community just like I fight for mine.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20268?refcode=em20210618-1762&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=1762%2E434096%2EidNn4t)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20268?refcode=em20210618-1762&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1762%2E434096%2EidNn4t)**
Thanks for all you do,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

clean_body: I’m going to tell you about my tattoos, Peter. Peter, We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe that’s why my tattoos are literally the first thing people Google about me. Well enough Googling. Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself, Peter. On my left arm I have the zip code 15104. That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania, my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 15 years. Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill. On my right arm I have nine different dates. These are the dates when people were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as mayor, starting in 2005. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to get one more date added because in June of 2018, there was another tragic loss of life. My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had been robbed and killed by gun violence. Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world, Peter. In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to go through. In my 15 years as mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I helped initiate youth and art programs for the students of our community and we worked together to create a community center. We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off, kick-started our economy, and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment as Mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss of life due to gun violence. Peter, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I believe that every community is worth fighting for. And I promise that I will fight for you and your community in the Senate as if it were my own. But in order to build the kind of campaign that can win, we need to raise a lot of money. A big part of that is people like you chipping in. With our Q2 fundraising deadline just around the corner, I have to ask: Thanks for all you do, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Brian Hawkins
subject: My 40 acres and a mule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hawkins for Congress
body:
I’m Brian Hawkins, a descendant of American slaves. I just visited the 40 acres of land my family received as reparations for slavery and I was struck I’m Brian Hawkins, a descendant of American slaves. I just visited the 40 acres of land my family received as reparations for slavery and I was struck by how those reparations made ZERO impact on the kind of man my father and I became. |
---
Peter,

Let me be clear, as a black Republican... **Reparations from people that never owned slaves is wrong!**

I’m Brian Hawkins, a descendant of American slaves. I just visited the 40 acres of land my family received as reparations for slavery and **I was struck by how those reparations made ZERO impact on the kind of man my father and I became.**

And with this Supreme Court loss, there's no time to wait. = = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for helping us fight back against bigotry. Today is really hard, but we're so grateful to have you with us in this struggle. \- When Democrats Turn Out = P.S. The courts will not protect equality \-- only Democrats powered by a grassroots movement can end this injustice. That's why we're organizing engaged Democrats to support progressive leaders and demand change. Peter, if you're as upset about this ruling as we are, will you help us fight back and pass the Equality Act with a $10 donation? Here's the link to give: = | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. All contributions are made to support When Democrats Turn Out PAC's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I call B.S. on Republicans’ new voter suppression bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I won’t sit back while Republicans tear our democracy down
#

Friend —
Garbage. That’s what I called the new voter suppression bill Pennsylvania Republicans advanced this week.
I want you to see first-hand how hard I fought against the Pennsylvania GOP’s new bill that will make it more difficult for working people to vote.
**[Will you click below to watch my video and then chip in to take our fight for voting rights to the U.S. Senate?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31017253/291345480/-1576257730?refcode2=53a68c03-5bd0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210618-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E2OGMwMy01YmQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eppCabHirC49c1QaQx9_A50fgAc7IZou6sALkE5dUa4=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31017254/291345481/-1576257730?refcode2=53a68c03-5bd0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210618-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E2OGMwMy01YmQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eppCabHirC49c1QaQx9_A50fgAc7IZou6sALkE5dUa4=)
**[WATCH](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31017255/291345482/-1576257730?refcode2=53a68c03-5bd0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210618-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E2OGMwMy01YmQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eppCabHirC49c1QaQx9_A50fgAc7IZou6sALkE5dUa4=)**
The Republicans who advanced this bill are the same people who stoked a fire of lies about the 2020 election.
Now they want to act as if they’re the firefighters for our democracy. I call B.S. on that.
This new bill is full of restrictions that will discourage working folks from voting — like voter ID, limiting access to ballot drop boxes, and making it harder to vote by mail.
We can’t have a government that works for working people if we don’t have a democracy that works for working people.
**So I won’t sit back while these politicians tear our democratic process down piece by piece. I’m fighting back, and I need your support to stop them.**
**[Friend, if you’re with me, I hope you’ll click here to see our fight for voting rights in action. And while you’re there, could you chip in a few bucks to fuel our movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31017260/291345483/-1576257730?refcode2=53a68c03-5bd0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210618-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E2OGMwMy01YmQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eppCabHirC49c1QaQx9_A50fgAc7IZou6sALkE5dUa4=)**
Thanks for helping me fight back.
Best,
Malcolm

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: What a Night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Hoosier Republicans made it a great night last Friday at our Spring Dinner.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470578?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**What a Night!**_ Hoosier Republicans made it a great night last Friday at our Spring Dinner, the first large, in-person gathering of Hoosier Republicans since the start of the pandemic. Nearly 700 of you attended to belatedly celebrate our tremendous 2020 wins and hear an amazing keynote from the next governor of Arkansas Sarah Huckabee Sanders. When I saw the large group of Republicans together and rattled off our record of success—all statewide elected officials, 88% of county officers, 71 mayors, supermajorities in both houses, both US Senate seats, 7 of 9 US House seats—what I said that night was true: **_YOUR INDIANA REPUBLICAN PARTY HAS NEVER BEEN STRONGER!_**

But we can’t be happy where things are. As Sarah Huckabee Sanders reminded us, it is as important as ever to remain united and work together to defeat the radical left and their harmful agenda. When you look at what the Biden-Harris-Pelosi-AOC regime are trying to accomplish with their razor-thin majorities in Washington our mission couldn’t be clearer. If you want to stop court packing, HR 1, DC statehood, massive tax increases, an America-last foreign policy, taxpayer funded abortions, and the crisis at our southern border, we must stay united here in Indiana and across the country to deliver Republican victories at every level in 2022, 2024, and beyond. And, after the great Spring Dinner we had, I know Hoosier Republicans will continue to do our part to keep the winning streak going.

Thanks Kyle

**Photo** : _Chairman Hupfer with former White House press secretary and Arkansas gubernatorial candiate Sarah Huckabee Sanders_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Indiana's Highest Honor_** **Governor Holcomb** attended the Indianapolis Indians' game Tuesday evening to honor a fellow Hoosier. Joe Drescher received the Sagamore of the Wabash, one of Indiana's highest honors, for his life-long service to the Hoosier state.
**Governor Holcomb** and**First Lady Janet Holcomb** visited the newly-renovated White River State Park Amphitheater on Sunday. The TCU Amphitheater will act as a large entertainment center where Hoosiers can come together to enjoy music and other events.

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb with Joe Drescher as he was presented with the Sagamore of the Wabash award._
---
|
---
| _**Spring Dinner Thank you**_ A HUGE Thank you to everyone who made our Spring Dinner a smashing success. Here are some pictures of the evening.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Hupfer: Bad Faith Democrat Attacks on Election Integrity are Failing**_ Chairman Hupfer has a new op-ed in Real Clear Politics where he calls out Democrat attacks on our elections.
**_“_ _The COVID-19 pandemic breathed new life into the Democrat voting offensive that before the crisis seemed out of ideas. Their showcase voting “rights” litigation pre-pandemic was an unsuccessful and petty attack on state rules for the order in which candidates appear on the ballot.Bad actors on the left leveraged the pandemic in order to attack established voting processes. The cynicism in these theatrics is matched only by their ineffectiveness” -Chairman Hupfer_**
Read the entire piece here: [https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2021/06/15/bad-faith_democrat_attacks_on_election_integrity_are_failing_145933.html](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=15aea580aa&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel Launches "Real America" Podcast**_ RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel launched her new podcast, “Real America.” and will be traveling the country sharing stories from outside the beltway, highlighting Republican leaders around the country and how Republican policies have improved Americans’ lives. Chairwoman McDaniel is offering the platform for Republican leaders to share their successes and for listeners to hear real stories from the exciting, leading voices in our Party.
_**“America is an amazing country filled with wonderful people who do incredible things, but too often the media and liberal politicians ignore big parts of our nation and the people who make it work. So I'm thrilled to speak with these amazing leaders and policymakers in our party who solve real problems every day, and help spread their message far and wide.” -Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel**_
Chairwoman McDaniel's Podcast is available on Spotify, Appple Podcasts, or wherever podcasts are available. [Click here to listen](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=be38375471&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cf3dbb1244&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[June 18](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=71000ec861&e=1acd9bb3d6): Wells County GOP Trivia Night
[June 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c726e1c164&e=1acd9bb3d6): Jasper County GOP Golf Scramble
[June 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d2cd503c77&e=1acd9bb3d6): Clay County Republican Club Meeting
[July 17](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=df403cec35&e=1acd9bb3d6): Blackford County Lincoln Day Dinner

| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb** [speaks with Israeli leaders about Israel-Indiana relationship](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=062463873f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[meets with Oakland City mayor to discuss affordable housing](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1fcf681fa0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [celebrates 5 years of text-to-911](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=56a2235cb6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[warns of a possible scam](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f6b9cc3b3a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan **[visits with Noblesville Chamber of Commerce](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ad9cec7967&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Todd Rokita** [celebrates Flag Day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2e6f8f31d7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[celebrates 125 years of the Indiana Veteran's Home](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d13dd2bdbb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun**[ joins Sean Spicer on NewsMax](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4f7c772cb2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[fights for seniors to get full Social Security benefits](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2c4f85993f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[urges Congress to be honest about reckless spending](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b27402eb94&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [shares how tax increases affect farmers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a762f1b6d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [shares history of Flag Day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e364bd7896&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** [talks about how Biden's policies are raising prices](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ffb495fd98&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[shares concerns about curriculum in schools](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=200e98dbe0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[honors allied the allied forces who landed on D-Day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6c9ec8f58e&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Modern-day Slavery in America?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BhqxG3&mc=JL&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECZFGhr&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/4d012592-e864-4e66-b450-49a4f21ec710.png]

Yes, there is Modern-day Slavery in America.

Drugs and human trafficking.

Sex trafficking occurs heavily on the southern border and DEA Special Agent Jarod Forget in Charge, Washington D.C. Division, discusses how the opioid problem and human trafficking go hand in hand [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0ra9P&mc=JL&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJgbVYL&]. Drug cartels will often get victims of trafficking addicted to opioids in order to better control and exploit them for financial gain.

Does human trafficking occur in Washington State?

Unfortunately it does. In 2019 Washington State was ranked in the 15 worst states [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0raRt&mc=JL&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECVAMTZ&]for human trafficking cases and with the drug cartels seeking a foothold in the PNW [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0rar1&mc=JL&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EMtZMQg&]. With the increase of illegal crossings we are seeing we can also expect the influx of human trafficking to continue to sky rocket in 2021!

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/f4675f33-8479-4f9b-bf16-7c97fca3106e.jpg]

There have already been 929,868 encounters on the southern border!

In May of 2020 there where 23,237 encounters and in May of 2021 there have been 180,034 encounters. That is a 775% increase! With the dynamic and complicated nature of human trafficking there is no way of knowing how many of those individuals were being brought over to be placed into modern-day slavery and imagine the numbers that were not caught. Read the statistics here. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0ra0X&mc=JL&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Ey9zhcq&]

Sex offenders coming across as well.
U.S. Border Patrolagents arrested 10 convicted sexual offenders in May 20 [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0raWE&mc=JL&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EBROMGW&]21! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0raiU&mc=JL&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EzqGFTd&]With Biden's open border in the 2021 Fiscal Year, Border Patrol agents have arrested 95 convicted sex offenders, a 3,166% increase over the same timeframe last fiscal year.

We need strong Americans who will stand up against Biden!

Newhouse talks about building the border wall but when it comes down to being tough and standing for America he habitually compromises. Rather than supporting President Trump he voted to unconstitutionally impeach him and sided with Biden and the radical left in congress. I will always stand with you, the American people, and vote constitutionally while insuring we have a strong border.

Let's send a strong message to Newhouse that we don't want a weak RINO who cares more about what his buddies in congress think of him than the people he represents. I have your back and will always look to serve you. Together we can "Make America Great Again" and secure our border. Help me raise the money required to defeat Newhouse and once more put America first!

We will win!

Loren

| St. Louis, MO - Former Governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens toured the Arizona Audit process over the weekend on Saturday, June 12th before making a trip down to the southern border to observe first-hand how the illegal immigration crisis has been impacting America's national security.
Greitens announced on Steve Bannon's War Room: Pandemic his decision to visit Arizona, saying that he would be on the front lines of the secured audit process as it is the epicenter of the MAGA movement.
[Watch the announcement here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xzfgSEZWlL8s_y-gRmJ1yJM5dWb5xpQgHqcST5dc-38-Y1mx025jmTZLEVa0P1FKObyW7tmoz6J-hXJwQ3HUZ5FAp9YYr-ge3o3jAZMQIybFqyuLJi9EF1OJvjhzYZvuHfktts-nVssR_sQGmuyfLJJ8Lgtu1jvXS_dG0kiLf_0TRp-pp0wK1Dxo793hMTC-LwLpsd60jl_ytZgpuYRXkn_oWLyP0tUaxKiFKo27mDwrNdpMxd4oaOOmNaEAfJsM&c=oEjMpucmHJpowAVOU6cCHT7KB5g0P1py-X_IrO1kQlbEroUgfykhOw==&ch=vV3Alt0Mfc8sNBlGCiQK1l1SxjN6kalJd2d3UZ44aLLruXcc1wnzRQ==) ["If they don't have the ballots, they don't have the victory."](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xzfgSEZWlL8s_y-gRmJ1yJM5dWb5xpQgHqcST5dc-38-Y1mx025jmTZLEVa0P1FKObyW7tmoz6J-hXJwQ3HUZ5FAp9YYr-ge3o3jAZMQIybFqyuLJi9EF1OJvjhzYZvuHfktts-nVssR_sQGmuyfLJJ8Lgtu1jvXS_dG0kiLf_0TRp-pp0wK1Dxo793hMTC-LwLpsd60jl_ytZgpuYRXkn_oWLyP0tUaxKiFKo27mDwrNdpMxd4oaOOmNaEAfJsM&c=oEjMpucmHJpowAVOU6cCHT7KB5g0P1py-X_IrO1kQlbEroUgfykhOw==&ch=vV3Alt0Mfc8sNBlGCiQK1l1SxjN6kalJd2d3UZ44aLLruXcc1wnzRQ==)

name: Mark Warner
subject: It’s time to end our epidemic of gun violence. Sign on if you agree.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31018225/291349044/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWRjZTEwMS01ZmQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9D1xRlEJctallxTvaiYy0PM6fo0HeUVhzfMjP_K80O4=&emci=a200a82f-82c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f5dce101-5fd0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | Friend,

For years, our country has tried to address the rising epidemic of gun violence at the federal level. And for years, our leaders have failed to pass meaningful reform.

**But here in Virginia, we’ve led the way by making progress on our own.** That’s why I joined Senator Tim Kaine in introducing our Virginia Plan to Reduce Gun Violence Act.

**[This legislation builds on commonsense reforms Virginia passed in 2020 to reduce gun violence — if you agree that it’s time for change at the federal level, add your name now to support our efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31018226/291349046/-537626125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWRjZTEwMS01ZmQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9D1xRlEJctallxTvaiYy0PM6fo0HeUVhzfMjP_K80O4=&emci=a200a82f-82c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f5dce101-5fd0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)**

Our proposed legislation would enact:
* **Universal Background Checks:** Background checks would be required on all firearm sales and transfers, including for weapons sold online and at gun shows.
* **One-Handgun-a-Month:** Individuals would be limited to purchasing one handgun a month to curtail the stockpiling and trafficking of firearms.
* **Reporting of Lost or Stolen Firearms:** Gun owners would be required to report lost or stolen firearms to the appropriate state or local law enforcement agency within 48 hours.
* **Preventing Firearm Access to Minors:** Individuals would be held liable for leaving a loaded, unsecured gun in the presence of a minor, thereby encouraging safe, responsible gun ownership.
* **Protection Order Prohibitions:** This would close the “boyfriend loophole” by prohibiting non-spousal abusive partners, and those convicted of dating violence and stalking, from possessing firearms. This would provide additional protections to victims of intimate partner violence.
* **Extreme Risk Protection Orders:** This would establish a federal extreme risk protection order to temporarily remove firearms from individuals who pose a high risk of harming themselves or others. It would also incentivize states to implement their own extreme risk protection laws and court protocols.

These measures are working in Virginia, and Americans in every corner of our country deserve to live under the same protections. **I’m committed to doing everything I can to make that a reality.**

I hope you’ll join me and sign on to support legislation that will keep all Americans safer.
| [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31018227/291349048/-537626125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWRjZTEwMS01ZmQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9D1xRlEJctallxTvaiYy0PM6fo0HeUVhzfMjP_K80O4=&emci=a200a82f-82c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f5dce101-5fd0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)
---

Thank you for being with me in this fight,
Mark Warner

body:
We’re closing the books on our mid-month goal tonight at midnight -- and we can't afford to come up short with the Senate majority at risk.
#

Peter,
Critical rulings came down from the Supreme Court yesterday — with mixed results.

[**I joined America’s Newsroom on Fox News to discuss both rulings in detail >>> WATCH HERE**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=503ddd0938604282829ba31ca6507b0b&_e=aZuXfR1CXSxnnQdHroKsd1dEETjH4NJaOVrKIe13kybTPnIbffSuQYgG4DAQLoUCVZBxL2k2h-APDruOCAY1e6J0AWH3viSAca5TkYny5QDdPQKERwfeB1Dv-07pU-XNXos2pItpnI8K6w3sedcflcKg2638Af8TRY_kkmvu988RDJP0QKo6o7OHU0ECetYK4pDDzFuV4IKul6RYtedRg80sHH83HbruCnWzm07FHzEyRUw-Yx-PrEa4ekUhSZge5oEIgXRSwefXR-GbAAH2j1gx0p93aRn3OzSlbCTa_M9QiFKXw1EDHgZk88JkSeGqgC9bjxxJ8DY_lYPHiaJ1KWefHSoB6HOM5M-lxnSBH8cTMdkfGFLy9N9ayPbYW43w9LN0sO8QeBP07nDJs__7WQ%3D%3D)

In a split decision, the Supreme Court refused to rule on the merits of Obamacare, instead saying the states didn’t have standing to sue.

_** **_**_Watch the interview:_ **
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=503ddd0938604282829ba31ca6507b0b&_e=aZuXfR1CXSxnnQdHroKsd1dEETjH4NJaOVrKIe13kybTPnIbffSuQYgG4DAQLoUCVZBxL2k2h-APDruOCAY1e6J0AWH3viSAca5TkYny5QDdPQKERwfeB1Dv-07pU-XNXos2pItpnI8K6w3sedcflcKg2638Af8TRY_kkmvu988RDJP0QKo6o7OHU0ECetYKLt90fra-SLH7umUX05G-KMFBFNZY7gMjGJn5sNv5EQIQQYj5cjjPtq_dwQ1VqqtkivX0tB3JfvarQCOY306oOYRUTGMjZ1FlGJxXacX_mqvgcxBOrCdD5FjEKj-rqHu5i40fKVtIS11mOZxMe6t88zGtxuVJeLpU8UXCEQx5HeyCIfaeWRWKovHDs0cwg9kqW8OkuWez9B9CvAZ7hjv2UA%3D%3D)
This makes it more important than ever to find ways to make healthcare **MORE AFFORDABLE** , to continue to cover those with pre-existing conditions, and at the same time to increase choice in healthcare plans.

In a resounding pro-religious liberty decision, the Supreme Court **UNANIMOUSLY RULED** that religious organizations cannot be discriminated against on the basis of their faith.

_[**Watch my Fox News interview and make sure to share with your friends and family.**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=503ddd0938604282829ba31ca6507b0b&_e=aZuXfR1CXSxnnQdHroKsd1dEETjH4NJaOVrKIe13kybTPnIbffSuQYgG4DAQLoUCVZBxL2k2h-APDruOCAY1e6J0AWH3viSAca5TkYny5QDdPQKERwfeB1Dv-07pU-XNXos2pItpnI8K6w3sedcflcKg2638Af8TRY_kkmvu988RDJP0QKo6o7OHU0ECetYKvj8_14mwSvRt5FA-wSfnVoYXdEBFDSqHQLGMWB8QqTvlydOZo66PN9zDo3EsJ5QeqKKyTTdd7wSFeGhVFZhAoUVlu-riIT582DgwJYTDk1Dy_VuSVy3pHQrNzKKQy1h8TjtfsMJr7CnyI0MeRU_yE2iYpyQwO9h5MoiqQxruyLLQHRJxTxyIwPaeGpu392vfqWCDpDKTvyzf2Lik7Gd_rQ%3D%3D)_

clean_body: Watch my Fox News interview and make sure to share with your friends and family. | | Peter, Critical rulings came down from the Supreme Court yesterday — with mixed results. In a split decision, the Supreme Court refused to rule on the merits of Obamacare, instead saying the states didn’t have standing to sue. Watch the interview: This makes it more important than ever to find ways to make healthcare MORE AFFORDABLE , to continue to cover those with pre-existing conditions, and at the same time to increase choice in healthcare plans. In a resounding pro-religious liberty decision, the Supreme Court UNANIMOUSLY RULED that religious organizations cannot be discriminated against on the basis of their faith. God Bless, Josh P.S.
