name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c256%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=l5hkosB%2fKW%2bGN0oLC62RIg&sysid=1)
Dear Fellow Patriot,
I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state.
For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved “opinions” on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election.
And if that wasn’t bad enough, we’ve now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election.
**In other words, we’ve caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents ...**
And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper.
[**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4577%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qu17i4HU04KvDSDC3CpSrQ&sysid=1)
Let me explain...
In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to “educate voters” with “valid information” on election laws and procedures.
And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State’s Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O’Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments “rules about election integrity”. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4578%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gC%2bHj9Y%2btqKOcTztu1ykMA&sysid=1) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results.
And every time he made a statement that was deemed a “violation”, it was promptly removed from Twitter.
But that is not the worst of it...
Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan’s tweets as “misinformation” and coded it as an “orange” level threat indicating problematic speech.
_**Then it happened ...**_
After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether.
Hopefully I don’t need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech.
But Rogan’s Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people.
So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan’s tweets could damage Joe Biden’s image.
In fact, Rogan’s opinions didn’t just threaten the image of Joe Biden.
The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris’ vacated Senate seat._
It’s doesn’t take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional.
**And that’s why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment.**
[**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4579%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IluKiG%2bkJB0wsAtb9QW%2fvw&sysid=1)
My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them.
But I’ll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad.
Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan’s First Amendment right to free speech...
We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions.
**And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we’ve ever fought.**
You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself.
_And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._
[**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4570%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CZyRl4XhSv1QgAVBzMriOw&sysid=1)
I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country.
Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms?
Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives?
[**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4571%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fjR49RhbhEt9Pfav%2fDk9xA&sysid=1)
Thank you in advance for your support.
Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don’t know about you, but I am fed up with the left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4572%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tpeZ1b6%2f44Gi%2b%2bV2PlUFIw&sysid=1) [**DONATE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4573%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RcDKwDRVV4BkuTbMUEJAng&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4574%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YF1BTc5TsJFfXk5i1FIg%2fg&sysid=1) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4585%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=il5Mn%2fcXcpRF2909pvExoA&sysid=1) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4586%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FJxwnj%2bGJ4%2fOS3MPriLstA&sysid=1) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c256%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=l5hkosB%2fKW%2bGN0oLC62RIg&sysid=1)_

And that’s why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I’ll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan’s First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we’ve ever fought. You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don’t know about you, but I am fed up with the left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: No thanks, Senator Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
55 isn’t going to cut it, Senator Manchin.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3671?refcode=em20210618-387&t=1&akid=387%2E420207%2EJti9Oz)
You know what didn’t get 55 votes in the Senate? The bill to create a January 6 commission to fully investigate the deadly attack on the Capitol. Changing the filibuster from 60 votes to 55 wouldn’t have changed that. The filibuster needs to be ended for the sake of our Democracy.
But it’s not just the January 6 commission. The For the People Act — a historic voting rights bill to take on the GOP’s voter suppression rampage — would STILL be stuck in the Senate if the filibuster threshold was lowered to 55. It’s the same case with humane immigration reform, combating climate change, getting big money out of politics, the PRO Act, a $15 minimum wage, and gun safety reform. None of it will pass with 55 votes because the GOP obstructionists won’t allow it.
[**We have been clear: we need to immediately end the filibuster and deliver for the people — that’s why voters delivered Democrats the House, Senate, and White House. If you agree about getting rid of the filibuster, can you make a donation today to fuel our fight for democracy?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3671?refcode=em20210618-387&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=387%2E420207%2EJti9Oz)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3671?refcode=em20210618-387&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=387%2E420207%2EJti9Oz)**
The policies that Pramila and her Democratic colleagues in the House have passed are overwhelmingly popular among voters across party lines, just like the American Rescue Plan was. By ending the filibuster, we can finally PASS them with a simple majority.
The voters who turned out in massive numbers in the general election and Georgia runoff elections don't want Democrats to weaken our proposals in order to get the support of a senator from a Republican party that wants to stop us at every turn. **They just want us to go big, go bold, and go fast on the change we promised them. They want results — and we must deliver them. Full stop.**
**[If you agree with us on this, please chip in $3 or anything at all to power our fight to end the filibuster and pass critical legislation.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3671?refcode=em20210618-387&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=387%2E420207%2EJti9Oz)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210618-387-footer&t=23&refcode2=387_420207_Jti9Oz&akid=387%2E420207%2EJti9Oz)**

| Dear Patriot, I've been the victim of a shocking amount of political violence and attacks from the left. The militant Left has physically harmed me and threatened my family, all in the name of mindless partisan warfare. And now Andrew McCabe, the disgraced former FBI agent, is making excuses for their violence. Do you remember Andrew McCabe? He was one of the Russia Hoaxers-in-Chief -- a professional liar who created a media hysteria by helping to concoct a fantasy about Russian collusion. After he got exposed for lying under oath, he resigned in disgrace. But like all attention-starved government bureaucrats and professional liars, he still weasels his way into the public spotlight every now and then. **I must confess, I was furious when I heard the latest statements he made about the shooting of Republican Congressmen back in 2017 -- a shooting that I managed to escape just in the nick of time.** On CNN, Andrew McCabe had this to say: _“The FBI still doesn’t exactly know what that shooter was up to. They never really uncovered the sort of detailed evidence that laid out a specific plot of an objective.”_ That's an outrageous and infuriating statement. I have news for you, Mr. McCabe: we know what that shooter was "up to." He was there to kill Republicans -- plain and simple. James Hodgkinson, the Left-wing radical who tried to shoot us all, had a list of Republican targets in his pocket when he shot up the baseball field we were at. He asked two of my colleagues what party we were members of, then started shooting as soon as he found out we were Republicans. I've been targeted more than anybody: at the baseball field, at my home, on the streets of D.C. But through it all, I've never wavered in my commitment to fight for liberty and truth. In May, the FBI was forced under extreme political pressure to reclassify the shooting, after they had previously listed it as "suicide by cop" instead of a political attack. I cannot repeat this enough: James Hodgkinson had a list of targets. He wasn't committing "suicide by cop," he was trying to commit mass murder. Lying is bad enough to begin with. Lying to cover up for an attempted mass murderer is indefensible. [I need your help fighting for the truth against this sea of lies. clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, I've been the victim of a shocking amount of political violence and attacks from the left. The militant Left has physically harmed me and threatened my family, all in the name of mindless partisan warfare. And now Andrew McCabe, the disgraced former FBI agent, is making excuses for their violence. Do you remember Andrew McCabe? He was one of the Russia Hoaxers-in-Chief -- a professional liar who created a media hysteria by helping to concoct a fantasy about Russian collusion. After he got exposed for lying under oath, he resigned in disgrace. But like all attention-starved government bureaucrats and professional liars, he still weasels his way into the public spotlight every now and then. I must confess, I was furious when I heard the latest statements he made about the shooting of Republican Congressmen back in 2017 -- a shooting that I managed to escape just in the nick of time. On CNN, Andrew McCabe had this to say: “The FBI still doesn’t exactly know what that shooter was up to. They never really uncovered the sort of detailed evidence that laid out a specific plot of an objective.” That's an outrageous and infuriating statement. I have news for you, Mr. McCabe: we know what that shooter was "up to." He was there to kill Republicans -- plain and simple. James Hodgkinson, the Left-wing radical who tried to shoot us all, had a list of Republican targets in his pocket when he shot up the baseball field we were at. He asked two of my colleagues what party we were members of, then started shooting as soon as he found out we were Republicans. I've been targeted more than anybody: at the baseball field, at my home, on the streets of D.C. But through it all, I've never wavered in my commitment to fight for liberty and truth. Andrew McCabe isn't the only one who's been hiding the truth on this. In May, the FBI was forced under extreme political pressure to reclassify the shooting, after they had previously listed it as "suicide by cop" instead of a political attack. I cannot repeat this enough: James Hodgkinson had a list of targets. He wasn't committing "suicide by cop," he was trying to commit mass murder. Lying is bad enough to begin with. Lying to cover up for an attempted mass murderer is indefensible. Political violence must never be allowed to win. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | ** Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) P.S. I was targeted by a deranged gunman, along with other Republican Congressmen.** And former FBI Russia Hoaxer Andrew McCabe says "The FBI still doesn’t exactly know what that shooter was up to." Let me answer that for you Mr. McCabe -- he was there to murder Republicans. I've been targeted for political violence more than any other elected official. It's been very scary for my family. | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Protecting the Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2WLoS1zC_wksVUN4qhy1645yzp92J07Di030grLerAM=/Lg0TNUIJkUqXHfACjJfgoPsYyMRTpCKE1TQT2VRcl-k=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210618-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

In 2017, the House of Representatives voted to take away protections for those with pre-existing conditions.

**That was the day I decided to run for Congress.**

Since then, there has been a concerted effort to destroy the Affordable Care Act. There have been numerous votes in the House of Representatives and challenges in court. **Yesterday, I was relieved to hear that the ACA had survived its third Supreme Court challenge.**
---
| | _**Affordable Care Act Survives Latest Supreme Court Challenge**_
**-New York Times, June 17, 2021**
---
**Peter, millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions, small business owners & families rely on ACA plans, and people under 26 rely on their parents for health insurance -- these are protections afforded by the ACA.**

[_**I remain committed to protecting our neighbors with pre-existing conditions, lowering costs, and stabilizing our healthcare system for Central Virginians. This issue is among the most important to me.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/2WLoS1zC_wksVUN4qhy1645yzp92J07Di030grLerAM=/Lg0TNUIJkUqXHfACjJfgoPsYyMRTpCKE1TQT2VRcl-k=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210618-1-EM&amount=25)

The threats against the ACA and a more affordable healthcare system are persistent. In 2022, I expect to have a challenging race. As we approach the end of our fundraising quarter, can I count on you to stand with me and my campaign and to help me fight for a stronger and more accessible healthcare system?
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/2WLoS1zC_wksVUN4qhy1645yzp92J07Di030grLerAM=/Lg0TNUIJkUqXHfACjJfgoPsYyMRTpCKE1TQT2VRcl-k=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210618-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Your contributions are a cornerstone of our strategy to win.

Thank you for your support,

_Abigail_

* * *

subject: I Am Honored to Have Your Support
body:
We continue to gain momentum
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
As our campaign continues to gain momentum I am so completely humbled and honored by the outpouring of support from Washingtonians all across our state.
I'd like to share with you some of the public endorsements I was so honored to receive during our campaign so far:
---
| Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers Congressman Doc Hastings Franklin County GOP State Rep. Joe Schmick Island County GOP State Rep. Cyndy Jacobsen VIEW PAC
---
| | | [DONATE!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dESwFDNb_0XizTbXARCrWuWJvUilEU7bTGjqKONmmRWH4LVxG0dKeQeSDTa5ouN-Edb4LgSlUYk82WvFYfBPFysD0tGuXG6g2q7_aKNJNQVnCFzg-rx6nayDYoDY-tdK2SfdUsKr5TCPUZ2aSHbc38C1kMx3F7eQhmUtLjIFazeT-RKsabNy5aSp292ImhYD&c=_OJgoBcpsVYb-kQoy0RBYA-2DsSxFftU27q9YdJ2Dl4lZ4ImzuK3fQ==&ch=2XKKD-Z12PFW6HCUE8oRQmyIHqnufwJ4QOGCM6qIv_ny031nAcmR3A==)
---
| This all started because I felt like I had to take a stand for the people of Washington. I saw the way our government was treating us, and I knew that we deserved better.
We deserve more jobs in our home state. We deserve better treatment for our veterans. We deserve secure protection for our farmers. That's why I'm in this fight.
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for supporting my campaign and thank you to all of the county parties and elected officials who have taken a public stand alongside us! It means the world to me that you would stand with me, because I could not continue on this journey without you.
But our fight has only just begun!. We have a long road ahead of us and I will need your continued support. [No matter the amount of donation, I will be able to use it to stand for Washingtonians. Can I count on your financial support TODAY?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dESwFDNb_0XizTbXARCrWuWJvUilEU7bTGjqKONmmRWH4LVxG0dKeQeSDTa5ouN-Edb4LgSlUYk82WvFYfBPFysD0tGuXG6g2q7_aKNJNQVnCFzg-rx6nayDYoDY-tdK2SfdUsKr5TCPUZ2aSHbc38C1kMx3F7eQhmUtLjIFazeT-RKsabNy5aSp292ImhYD&c=_OJgoBcpsVYb-kQoy0RBYA-2DsSxFftU27q9YdJ2Dl4lZ4ImzuK3fQ==&ch=2XKKD-Z12PFW6HCUE8oRQmyIHqnufwJ4QOGCM6qIv_ny031nAcmR3A==)
Sincerely,

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Stacey Abrams is in -- are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, You know as well as anyone that our team at When Democrats Turn Out has been pushing Senator Manchin for months to support the For The People Act, but we're also not unaware of the reality that we must do everything we can to stop the GOP's march toward authoritarianism and preserve our democracy. So when asked if she was in on Joe Manchin's voting rights bill, Stacey Abrams responded: **“Absolutely.”** And when Stacey Abrams tells us to jump, we don't ask how high \-- we get to work. | **[DONATE NOW TO HELP ABRAMS FIGHT BACK](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31024644/291372604/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210618_GEN_FDR_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiYWEwNWZiLTczZDAtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LsXm8X2sUBlXRsB8jbx27nvyKQF3MRXMeeVLCQVZhQE=)**
---

GOP dark-money groups have already pledged a massive amount of campaign cash to kill Manchin's compromise. **But we're fighting back** and launching a nationwide campaign to target swing-state voters, members of Congress, and members of the press to persuade them to join Stacey Abrams in support of this critical reform.

**[But to do that, we need to raise $10,000 by the end of June, and we're already falling behind. Peter, can you join Abrams' fight today and rush a donation of $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can to defend our democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31024647/291372607/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210618_GEN_FDR_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiYWEwNWZiLTczZDAtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LsXm8X2sUBlXRsB8jbx27nvyKQF3MRXMeeVLCQVZhQE=)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, You know as well as anyone that our team at When Democrats Turn Out has been pushing Senator Manchin for months to support the For The People Act, but we're also not unaware of the reality that we must do everything we can to stop the GOP's march toward authoritarianism and preserve our democracy. So when asked if she was in on Joe Manchin's voting rights bill, Stacey Abrams responded: “Absolutely.” And when Stacey Abrams tells us to jump, we don't ask how high \-- we get to work. | = GOP dark-money groups have already pledged a massive amount of campaign cash to kill Manchin's compromise. But we're fighting back and launching a nationwide campaign to target swing-state voters, members of Congress, and members of the press to persuade them to join Stacey Abrams in support of this critical reform. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much for being a part of our grassroots movement. This work is tireless, often thankless, and too often full of disappointments. But we're honored to be fighting by your side, and we're hopeful that our progress is soon to come. When Democrats Turn Out = P.S. This bill is just the beginning, but it is critically important that we pass it if we are to have any hopes of expanding upon it in the future. If you're with us, will you spare just a few dollars today and help us get to work to defend our democracy? Here is the link to give: = | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. All contributions are made to support When Democrats Turn Out PAC's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. name: =?utf-8?Q?VA=20Justice=20Dems=20Team?=
subject: Our democracy is under attack. We must pass HR 1.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats
body:
| | | | [ ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=bb791ddc44&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | | Derek-

We are consistently fighting for a healthier democracy by rooting out the influence of money in politics, making easier for all people to vote, and to make sure we are holding our elected officials accountable. Right now in the Senate, Democrats are fighting one of our own to make sure that they can pass the most comprehensive voting rights and democratic reform bill to date:
---
| [ ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=16747d1a38&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
---
| Virginia Justice Democrats recently signed onto a pledge with Un-PAC to call on our own senators, Mark Warner and Tim Kaine, to put more pressure on Sen. Joe Manchin to vote for passing the [For the People Act. ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=54353a6aba&e=76fc145c69)

Our democracy is under attack in Republican held states. Here in Virginia we have been fortunate enough to pass truly great legislation that will protect the right to vote and help our legislature actually represent the people. But we aren't finished our work here in Virginia and we certainly have not been able to say the same with some of our fellow states in the South.

You've heard us talk about HR 1 before but it is vitally important that we pass this piece of legislation through Congress to expand voting rights, change campaign finance laws to reduce the influence of money in politics, limit partisan gerrymandering, and create new ethics rules for federal officeholders.

Un-PAC is a national organization whose mission is to activate students and young people to demand long overdue structural democracy reform. They do this specifically by working to pass the For The People Act, a powerful democracy reform package that is being considered in both the House and Senate right now that is necessary to pass if we want to win things like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal.

[All are welcome to sign this pledge to call on your Senators to pass the For the People Act, and if you would like to get involved in Un-PAC’s work here in Virginia, you can indicate so on the pledge.](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=3db95ed319&e=76fc145c69)

Please contact your Senators and ask them to put pressure on Joe Manchin to help protect our democracy. In Solidarity, Virginia Justice Democrats.
---
| [SIGN THE PLEDGE](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=4ceeb749cb&e=76fc145c69 "SIGN THE PLEDGE")
---
| _Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process.

[Become a sustaining donor today by contributing just $5/month to help us continue to spread our message. ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=7a8213a08e&e=76fc145c69)_

clean_body: | | | | | | | Derek- We are consistently fighting for a healthier democracy by rooting out the influence of money in politics, making easier for all people to vote, and to make sure we are holding our elected officials accountable. Right now in the Senate, Democrats are fighting one of our own to make sure that they can pass the most comprehensive voting rights and democratic reform bill to date: | | | Virginia Justice Democrats recently signed onto a pledge with Un-PAC to call on our own senators, Mark Warner and Tim Kaine, to put more pressure on Sen. Joe Manchin to vote for passing the Our democracy is under attack in Republican held states. Here in Virginia we have been fortunate enough to pass truly great legislation that will protect the right to vote and help our legislature actually represent the people. But we aren't finished our work here in Virginia and we certainly have not been able to say the same with some of our fellow states in the South. You've heard us talk about HR 1 before but it is vitally important that we pass this piece of legislation through Congress to expand voting rights, change campaign finance laws to reduce the influence of money in politics, limit partisan gerrymandering, and create new ethics rules for federal officeholders. Un-PAC is a national organization whose mission is to activate students and young people to demand long overdue structural democracy reform. They do this specifically by working to pass the For The People Act, a powerful democracy reform package that is being considered in both the House and Senate right now that is necessary to pass if we want to win things like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Please contact your Senators and ask them to put pressure on Joe Manchin to help protect our democracy. In Solidarity, Virginia Justice Democrats. | "SIGN THE PLEDGE" | Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process. | Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats. name: Alex Padilla
subject: re: the Republican recall
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friend —

As you may know, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in
California — one that is led by a collection of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and
anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees.

They pose a real threat to the progress we’ve made here in California and
across the country. They’d love to defeat us and end our ability to fight
for a cleaner planet, immigration reform, or election security.

So I need your help today.
Because you can bet the same deep-pocketed Trump donors funding the recall
are going to set their sights on our campaign as well.

I plan on doing everything I can to hold this seat, but any amount of help
you can give would go a long way. And that’s why I have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210618-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=96_159979_cfLw_B&akid=96%2E159979%2EcfLw_B ]Will you make a $3 contribution to our grassroots
campaign before our official FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end?
We’ve got so much work to do in the coming months, and every donation we
receive in June sends a powerful message that we will not back down
without a fight.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210618-1-15&t=1014&refcode2=96_159979_cfLw_B&akid=96%2E159979%2EcfLw_B ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210618-1-15&t=1015&refcode2=96_159979_cfLw_B&akid=96%2E159979%2EcfLw_B ]Donate $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210618-1-15&t=1016&refcode2=96_159979_cfLw_B&akid=96%2E159979%2EcfLw_B ]Donate $50 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210618-1-15&t=1017&refcode2=96_159979_cfLw_B&akid=96%2E159979%2EcfLw_B ]Donate $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210618-1-15&t=1018&refcode2=96_159979_cfLw_B&akid=96%2E159979%2EcfLw_B ]Donate $250 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210618-1-15&t=1019&refcode2=96_159979_cfLw_B&akid=96%2E159979%2EcfLw_B ]Other amount

It’s support like yours that’s so crucial to our campaign. Thank you for
everything you do — it means so much to me to be alongside you in this
fight.

—Alex

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?source=em210618-1-15&t=1020&refcode2=96_159979_cfLw_B&akid=96%2E159979%2EcfLw_B ]DONATE NOW

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Equality can’t wait—
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
So why is the Equality Act sitting still in the Senate?

Hi Peter,
Did you know that right now—in 2021**—there are 27 states LGBTQ+ folks do not have full protection under the law in the areas of housing, employment, and more? TWENTY SEVEN.**
[**Sign our petition today to tell the Senate to pass the equality act NOW!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31026744/291379024/-1936847318?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2EzYmI1YS03Y2QwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RDIG-gyQoZyAp8HeB3QX5jTxFuErS571w2qhyAzc7i4=&emci=fd3f40a0-74d0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0ca3bb5a-7cd0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21617867)
Meanwhile, hateful anti-trans legislation is sweeping state legislatures across the country, bankrolled by dark money superPACs who want nothing more than to stir up divisive rhetoric and cruel policy.
**And just yesterday, the Supreme Court of the United States declared that public funding can be spent on private foster care agencies that refuse to place children with LGBTQ+ foster parents. **
I’m exhausted. I’m a proud gay man and I love living in California, where statewide law protects me from job or housing discrimination. For far too many folks across this country, that protection is not guaranteed. We need to expand these protections at the federal level, and that’s where the Equality Act comes in.
**HR-5, the Equality Act, makes sexuality and gender expression protected classes under civil rights legislation, just like race, religion, and disability. It has already passed the House of Representatives, but like so many other things, it’s stuck in the Senate, unable to pass the filibuster.**
It’s shameful (though not surprising) that very few Republicans are in favor of protection queer and trans folks, but it’s also incredibly disturbing that not all Democrats are on bored.
**[Sign our petition today and make your voice heard! Better yet, forward it to a few friends! We’ll send it to the Senate on June 30, the last day of Pride Month, as this year’s final act of pride-filled celebration and a demand for respect and dignity! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31026750/291379031/-1936847318?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2EzYmI1YS03Y2QwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RDIG-gyQoZyAp8HeB3QX5jTxFuErS571w2qhyAzc7i4=&emci=fd3f40a0-74d0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0ca3bb5a-7cd0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21617867)**
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for Congress, CA-08
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31026758/291379038/-1874959920?refcode=EM-DM-EOQ2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2EzYmI1YS03Y2QwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RDIG-gyQoZyAp8HeB3QX5jTxFuErS571w2qhyAzc7i4=)

Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

**[Please, donate to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31027345/291380291/-2023814932?refcode=20210618.4_SA_6ATR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDUyNGM1NS03ZWQwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9mF_7v3bU_8yUPGuKe4Esw92SsgQ2pby0f9vLoif_8=)**

clean_body: I’m counting on you, Derek. | | | = | | Derek, Just like the focus was on Georgia in 2020, all eyes will be on Virginia in 2021. My friend Terry McAuliffe is running for Governor against an extreme culture warrior who has the backing of Donald Trump and Ted Cruz. Derek, Virginia has made incredible progress under Terry’s leadership. If his opponent succeeds in using his deep pockets to buy the Virginia Governor's office, he will reverse the progress made across the Commonwealth. For Terry to win, he’ll need to build the biggest grassroots army in the history of Virginia politics. He can do it, but he needs our help. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.” And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access. On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards. In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress. So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance. = I’m counting on you, Derek. Stacey Abrams = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

subject: The GOP is crowdfunding hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter \-- Did you see the New York Times? Instead of spending their time helping Americans recover from the pandemic, these Republicans plan to waste a **quarter of a billion dollars of taxpayer money** on Trump's border wall. And to pay for the rest? They are starting a crowdfunding campaign. **So we're starting our own campaign to make sure that Trump never gets his wall.** **[**Let's cancel out every crowdfunded MAGA dollar.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31028594/291384468/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210618_GEN_FDR_J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlODJkNGJlLTg0ZDAtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=85YJYO4QFESUZM_u4YkcDKlQW65Uvw6HVjmyBHGiIHc=)** | **[HELP DEMOCRATS STOP TRUMP'S WALL](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31028595/291384469/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210618_GEN_FDR_J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlODJkNGJlLTg0ZDAtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=85YJYO4QFESUZM_u4YkcDKlQW65Uvw6HVjmyBHGiIHc=)**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Major win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
I just keep winning against the left |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=726912d066&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

If I’ve learned anything over the last week it’s this:

**They can try what they want, but they can’t fight freedom.**

What do I mean by that?

_I have been targeted, attacked, and smeared for my conviction in the Election Integrity Movement. The Left doesn’t like what they see._

**And we just proved to everyone that you can’t mess with freedom.**

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud Trumpian Conservative, the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, a former police officer, paramedic, first responder, Arizona State Representative and leader in the Arizona business community.

**I am the candidate Trump called “a strong leader,” am endorsed by Bernard Kerik, and I have the wind at my sails in my campaign for Arizona Secretary of State!**

[_Donate TODAY to protect America’s and Arizona’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d33407e4e7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=400dc1d4e2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| We are leading a tremendous grassroots movement to fight the election steal, and stop the Democrats in their tracks as they plot their next attack on Democracy!

[**But we are coming up on the quarter-end fundraising deadline and I need ALL the support we can get, if we can ever HOPE of keeping elections in Arizona sacred!**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6bf2e71a9f&e=44b8c466b0)

If I can help engineer America’s Audit in Maricopa County, imagine what I could do as Secretary of State of Arizona!

[Donate as much as you can to send a message to Democrats that you can’t fight freedom and you can’t steal elections!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=653d941595&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b41365f33d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_The Recall effort against me and against freedom has FAILED!_**

Yes, you heard that right.

**The baseless accusations have been thwarted and now I am free to focus all of my energy on fighting for America’s elections!**

_The Gateway Pundit writes:_

_The recall effort for Rep. Mark Finchem fails. Free speech lives in Arizona. Finchem can now focus on the Secretary of State Race – Because God knows Arizona is ready for a person of integrity in that office._

_In spite of official public records regarding the truth about Representative Finchem’s advocacy for our First Amendment rights, the so-called “Rural Arizonans for Accountability” group has persisted in promoting their baseless false claims._

_ The lawsuit will come soon enough, but for now, we must protect this Legislative seat from people who are willing to lie to take power. First, they lied to the DOJ and FBI, then they lied to the compliant media, and now they are lying to the constituents of Legislative District 11._

_Lying has become the go-to tactic of the radical leftists. And then they hired BLM and ANTIFA workers to gather signatures. The organization is housed out of the Bolshevik hotbed of Tempe. “The truth is that I was in Washington DC to represent you and your interests in an election that was in controversy and at no time engaged in any unlawful activity. If I had, there would have been an investigation, but there is nothing to back up their fallacious claims,” says Rep. Finchem._

**Like I said earlier, you can try what you want, but you can’t fight freedom.**

_Why would the radical left attack me for trying to provide evidence to Vice President Pence showing evidence of fraud?_

**Because they are scared that the truth will bring them down.**

**_But I have good news for you, friends and patriots, the truth will set us free._**

And that is exactly what we are seeing in the Maricopa Audit right now!

**Bernard Kerik writes in _Newsmax:_**

_Democrats and the mainstream media have been aggressively denouncing the Maricopa County, Arizona election audit from the beginning._

_At, first I didn’t understand why._

_I thought that it was because they were afraid of what the results would be, but I now believe it’s something far worse._
_The Democrats aren’t “just” afraid of the outcome – but they’re afraid that the audit results will be irrefutable and unimpeachable. They know that their efforts to discredit the audit process in Arizona will not stand up to scrutiny and here’s why._

_The Arizona audit is being run impeccably, utilizing security and surveillance procedures with a longstanding track record of effectiveness._

_To say that I was impressed after viewing the audit process for myself would be a massive understatement. I’ve spent decades working in security and law enforcement at the highest levels, and this is exactly the level of conscientiousness and attention to detail that I would demand for a sensitive or high-profile investigation._

**The truth is on our sides.**

**_All I can ask you to do is be patient, have faith, and help me as I fight for you in Maricopa to save our elections!_**

[_Donate as much as you can to save our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=09debf54d8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| My name is Mark Finchem. I am the ORIGINAL Election Integrity Conservative, the Trump candidate, and the Patriot who WILL defend elections in Arizona once I am elected to Secretary of State.

**But it is absolutely crucial that you join the largest grassroots movement of the century.**

[_Are you in?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=31fe58ef26&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=45326df27e&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Biden's trip abroad, left's war on voting and more...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b0728d349b88/bidens-trip-abroad-lefts-war-on-voting-and-more?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## Biden meets with Putin...
President Biden had some of his first high stakes meetings this week in Europe the G7 in England, NATO and of course with President Vladimir Putin of Russia. Since President Biden’s meeting with President Putin I have heard a lot of talk about[ the aviators and glass sculpture](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3cc62c468a&e=f6564bbe3b) that Biden gave Putin, but much of the press overlooked the [pipeline](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cff9b6768a&e=f6564bbe3b) he also gave him.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=bba80f37ac&e=f6564bbe3b)
A further break down of Biden’s adventures from his week in Europe:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=19393236f9&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
## Democrats spread misinformation on voting laws...
Joe Biden [tweeted](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=001a0a1344&e=f6564bbe3b) recently, “We’re seeing a coordinated attack on voting rights in this country. It’s Jim Crow in the 21st century, and it must end. Congress must enact legislation to make it easier for all eligible Americans to access the ballot box and prevent attacks on the sacred right to vote.” In reference to new voting laws in Georgia. Using phrases like “Jim Crow” to refer to the voting laws in Georgia simply stokes racial tensions. These laws are not “Jim Crow.” Even The Washington Post has fact checked this narrative. GOP Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel joined us this week and we had a discussion about this, check it out:
| | | |
---
## Stories worth reading...
[Media Partisanship in Plain View](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=239dd3170b&e=f6564bbe3b) \- Karl Rove in the _Wall Street Journal_ The media is something I could talk about forever (shameless plug a good chunk of _Leading America_ is about it, available [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0442a84e09&e=f6564bbe3b)), but Karl Rove gives a great matter of fact look at how much the partisanship has changed and how little people care.
|
---
[Noem says she will try again for Mount Rushmore fireworks](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0501b2946e&e=f6564bbe3b) \- Stephen Groves in the _AP_ Okay, I give up on trying to follow the logic on this - Why can the White House have fireworks but South Dakota can’t?
|
---
[Bishops to debate banning communion for president](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4593707d92&e=f6564bbe3b) \- Alex Gangitano in _The Hill_
| | | |
---
## Help in the fight against pancreatic cancer...
Shortly after the 2016 election, I lost my father to pancreatic cancer.

Being able to share my experiences at the White House with my family was one of my favorite parts of my time there, and I never got to do that with my father.

So many others have lost loved ones to pancreatic cancer before their time, the same way I lost my father. Please consider joining me in continuing their fight against the disease through [Pancreatic Cancer Action Network](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=89b3e9c241&e=f6564bbe3b) and help us find a cure.

Join my team for the 2021 virtual PurpleStride [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=202fc909e9&e=f6564bbe3b), any amount helps.
| | | |
---
Last week I polled readers on whether or not Vice President Kamala Harris should visit the border, [the answer was overwhelmingly yes](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5f5401305c&e=f6564bbe3b). This weeks question below:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f93b8a804c&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | |
## What I’m reading this week...
Okay so this one I haven’t actually started, but I know will be a great read. The author, Jason Riley, is one of my must reads in the Wall Street Journal every week. His analysis is always insightful. Thomas Sowell is a champion for the conservative movement and conservative economics, I’m looking forward to knowing more about his story. Get your copy now and read with me, I’ll post some of my thoughts on my Instagram ([here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=68a5e0c58c&e=f6564bbe3b)) and you can let me know what you think. |
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fe600f2e28&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=648de4eaf7&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---

| | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=230815f459&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=acf064caac&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c2b5c6d549&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e452e294ce&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](mailto:contact@seanspicer.com)

name: Nick Freitas
subject: big government ≠ freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:
Friend, It isn’t that hard to understand: a bigger government with more power and more control _will not_ work in the best interests of the people it’s meant to govern. History is **FULL** of reasons why socialism has not, does not, and will not **EVER** work. _But the left-leaning mainstream media and elitists continue to push the false narrative that it will._ If I’ve learned one thing during my years of service, it’s that America is different -- and it was always _meant_ to be different. So while the radical left claims this is exactly why socialism would actually work here, I’m claiming this is exactly why we don’t **NEED** socialism! **America’s defining features are individual liberty and personal responsibility --****NOT****government power or control.** Serving in the Virginia House of Delegates, I’m continuing the fight against the radical left machine as they try pushing socialism into our Commonwealth. As a true patriot, will you stand up and join me in the fight, Friend? _[**_TAKE A STAND AGAINST SOCIALISM >>>_**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=b7c51325823a495494907d3c4f146b6b&_e=V0cz2JJZwrNkg44IZZuhrK0eZAGQVr-hR4xx78AzD6FXwVMAOHmZbh-lmU4Xo0ExRwo1tn75BNTeZvD0R5Af1cTGn-WpwwwpqCYklaWaUF3z9bW9ZELBcf1YiuvhRZqRkj4t_nfnKAC8dGmovv4qYbrxWW2Lhj-9h0e3Noypp7oTsVsP5QGqDliYcigRO3CWGPI34UGVrgzkAGZN3R7qFOC5hkh07WWO2unIfDl8Wtf19ttcwWqqBYEt4vAtY0TdQPtGBBwnhy4ye8939cO-n2UTF_vqGohlGTNn0eI0YSPxJnornfGJDLIL9tJcqNQQZIsHtHGha4B80gu1FJTOPmo9R7PrE3YFtjXQ1h3maCkRF2H9AvlybhzIwrNrnJ6fMFdcyu9Uob4WfQ-STR2Zgagg_H1pktuSAODsDfKF3joMFepOfKsyVNfguK0kJcL8)_ Thank you for your support, Nick Freitas [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=b7c51325823a495494907d3c4f146b6b&_e=V0cz2JJZwrNkg44IZZuhrK0eZAGQVr-hR4xx78AzD6FXwVMAOHmZbh-lmU4Xo0Exx8d4NC-nwi6EnL-584ZOWCZ_c8JMub-j8hO2BRJaOz4emaHlOyxWTqViNoOszahKQUCG4SlqyWci9UUiLDByyvmiVua624UkKGbuAOANQQYdLBEkEhu6jUWLSUCdaJRq1vSr-66RnaAQJFGWzLQhiyz4GjRKi8V0kj_8_Cc2Ll5H3Lgc4DXi54W2s3frFt2WTg-YmIyg18xPv3xrZKgtSIT7xtuI2WhTHu1F6JudAQ80vUkkcoSUErXFVa7W5bz-7jmHNp3cdOjdG3sAwb9ZvdSRCgKf_YhRgsyX-i89QIXFSxhiAXoiusF5YXCuYDBc4Eipzc92J6gfnAN74m_Q-Yvff0F9LBIUwmpwQ7uDpjniuRv4gRNmYPJkdSChfx8PfDTKffxNoos-kMBU-dJ7FQ%3D%3D) Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas

body:
I’m reaching out to you today to formally introduce myself and fill you in on my big announcement. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3e01155f87c349b0aa35d863b869689c&_e=uJ-3VassXK2TgHGMJz2jFODrisq-bPVhFYuXForiDGRHZ90BrkajPgOgl7bMeBqhxO-krFJAqh615nW2aoSxWlMzI1Y_KSZ0k0fKtaAzVud_xKHxtKPsFgPzHCmCPpZF-u4xUqEhFl2E_IGtxrpuOspjXhn4u56u7u_gex0c2BzAtf9EOwKEQMAurL6yBH6DwsS5N-9qDGGxcEoRqG5XgSEMzWV_4H16psm3wpjD4ylk1RmxidlbE_s2q82l9W9PuS59M8sow043cYsdxgeQt4paUL58NLS817O3sJexiNjTmb5rbVcblGtKB7tWxEvDK9yXPBsDbF2T11DXlMw4OEYcMszs8SeiW0atRRCUUnS_l4w3XApwvnHLYg32bjAAm3o4K7TUcW17jvXxMl7h5g%3D%3D)

Peter,

I’m reaching out to you today to formally introduce myself and fill you in on my big announcement. My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan.

Today, I am formally announcing my campaign for the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona. I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - [**and I need your support today in order to win this race and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3e01155f87c349b0aa35d863b869689c&_e=uJ-3VassXK2TgHGMJz2jFODrisq-bPVhFYuXForiDGRHZ90BrkajPgOgl7bMeBqhxO-krFJAqh615nW2aoSxWlMzI1Y_KSZ0k0fKtaAzVud_xKHxtKPsFgPzHCmCPpZF-u4xUqEhFl2E_IGtxrpuOspjXhn4u56u7u_gex0c2BzAtf9EOwKEQMAurL6yBH6DUJ7iTWS0-kp6uYPO71aQWL9f7PsVTRO22HqpYGzweBV-pLtkT-mClBexDhHTIFsmUgWAgrH-MOufnjEa0U1RH6_ywYesDUob7SzTXjuuOi2M1BHDJ75X-QUMfvcCwloVFt51fhJBUiJqshmX1s8bCxjk8SToVwDLD-NqVDc_q3F2MozY9BB-m96K4nVLcRRM70izyIiN6Ma5P-2BRfjJcA%3D%3D)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Asking for your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The goal must be passing a bill that helps working people the most.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210618-2225-header&t=1&akid=2225%2E2526796%2EHFtBgD)
We’re at a fork in the road.
Do we settle for an infrastructure package that has been largely designed by Republicans in order to get 60 “bipartisan” votes?
Or do we fight for a bill that does more for working people and creates millions of union jobs, revamps our power grid, rebuilds bridges and schools, and lowers climate emissions with 51 votes? *
Many decisions will be made in the coming weeks on what path to take and which measures to fight for in the infrastructure package. That’s why we’re asking today for your input:
[We want to know: what path do you support and which measures – from climate action to abolishing Trump’s tax cuts to lowering Medicare eligibility – are most important to you in this bill? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/infrastructure-survey/?source=em20210618-2225-P&t=2&akid=2225%2E2526796%2EHFtBgD)
**[Share your thoughts](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/infrastructure-survey/?source=em20210618-2225-P&t=3&akid=2225%2E2526796%2EHFtBgD)**
Alexandria has been very clear that this infrastructure package is our opportunity to go big and prioritize climate action while creating millions of union-jobs – not waste time debating about bipartisanship and pleasing special interests.
**We’ve seen that bipartisan deals too often leave behind already underserved communities while corporate interests take center stage.**
The goal must be passing a bill that helps working people the most – and the process of how we get there is less important. We need to ask ourselves: _are we passing a bill that creates the most jobs? Brings down the most climate emissions? Raises wages and actually improves our infrastructure for the next generation?_
Passing a deal whose scope is defined by a Republican minority that has not been elected to lead and that does very little to support working people or protect our planet is not good policy or politics.
[**We know that this package isn’t the best that we can get. Will you take a few minutes to share your thoughts on how our movement should proceed and what policies are most important to you?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/infrastructure-survey/?source=em20210618-2225-P&t=4&akid=2225%2E2526796%2EHFtBgD)
The clock is ticking to pass an infrastructure package before Congress goes on recess, so please don’t wait.
We’ll use these responses to help inform our strategy over the next few weeks as Alexandria fights for the best deal for working people.
Thanks for taking the time,
Team AOC
* Passing this bill with 51 votes is possible if it is done through the reconciliation process. Budget reconciliation is a special parliamentary procedure in Congress set up to expedite the passage of certain budgetary legislation in the Senate.

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210618-footer?refcode=em20210618-2225-P&t=5&refcode2=2225_2526796_HFtBgD&akid=2225%2E2526796%2EHFtBgD)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=2225%2E2526796%2EHFtBgD) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=2225%2E2526796%2EHFtBgD) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=2225%2E2526796%2EHFtBgD)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

That’s why we’re asking today for your input: Alexandria has been very clear that this infrastructure package is our opportunity to go big and prioritize climate action while creating millions of union-jobs – not waste time debating about bipartisanship and pleasing special interests. We’ve seen that bipartisan deals too often leave behind already underserved communities while corporate interests take center stage. The goal must be passing a bill that helps working people the most – and the process of how we get there is less important. We need to ask ourselves: are we passing a bill that creates the most jobs? Brings down the most climate emissions? Raises wages and actually improves our infrastructure for the next generation? Passing a deal whose scope is defined by a Republican minority that has not been elected to lead and that does very little to support working people or protect our planet is not good policy or politics. The clock is ticking to pass an infrastructure package before Congress goes on recess, so please don’t wait. We’ll use these responses to help inform our strategy over the next few weeks as Alexandria fights for the best deal for working people. Thanks for taking the time, Team AOC Passing this bill with 51 votes is possible if it is done through the reconciliation process. Budget reconciliation is a special parliamentary procedure in Congress set up to expedite the passage of certain budgetary legislation in the Senate. | | Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Tim Burchett
subject: The Hiring Struggle is Real ⚠️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsenTcZFa-r-pAZzXv-OaiX0qw_txCMwQRAb8MoAHSjef-ffIPOQbRUTIkNIVtu3veC3Xk1ux3vssgYf8iAWPcWJlP4CQylWS65IXx8R0nyl4fB8AcjJ_T05Cry_z79NPl87ZH6HdV7GW0_OLRtY_YuKRQl8EZQ1qds27JaKaXOn_blTWJAg1zYG3l1B0hX05Dg5qVg9drX_Aeo9YTz2MfM8hiEV4-Gm276nrM2OCi3y9H6GRKX9khV17D9mqkUkCB-5w2Nv3xi2Pa4bUJr3sa2xw8%3D) **The Hiring Struggle is Real ⚠️****
** When I travel throughout our district, I keep hearing the same frustration from our small business owners: They can’t find workers.
Why are they struggling so hard? Because the federal government increased unemployment benefits so much that people could earn more money NOT working than they would working!
Honestly, I can’t blame these workers. After a rough year of lockdowns, why would anyone rush back to work when they can earn more money staying home? But that doesn’t mean the federal government should be handing out checks when there are jobs available.
That’s why Republicans [pushed](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsenTzM7IkxyKjCxSkCDfm9z97L46EXruWtUTmdCh2P9HvmeJcgJd9BE5VvqdYRH-Yt0k--0T8oGENX8xvJLWIKiLEAJfh7sDskUwzCv-OUV-2iZkUS29gp2kCYYYCj38vSSrePS8OlbGquU_R4FWUFe430IooNU31-BxdMbxRWhobSkRLO7as3e4YxV5CWhVoPD2tcTN3l5Q8Red0aeDz38RYYmZYE49Nj4njNX6jPzQuP7N7EYJiMnn2wXQng8vr1xRjVfJ3BJ0hH3NOJcgpNP_EQJTLE7XPC-4Ksv2BHoek1fvGvR6PA2eN8chGMC8hO5w%3D%3D) to limit unemployment benefits as soon as businesses started opening up again. But Democrats got their way, and now, our economy is suffering the consequences.
According to the Tennessee Department of Labor and Workforce Development, nearly [167,000](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsenbvULl9a8QO7SE5Otqf7LRHKPzaw1lLYguBJdkkZx5nMiNVlrnhNHSjv-vu5oJL8gMga5Nh6v6XJfVTbIg8H12obMSvGZXQN2BwGVwaMkNZnsRIxc7iH7QRxRHaRRYbzCjy15gn-LolwCaaoskRrGuRi6nv1_J5LGJYHiMdOODWWMCBAroca3SyRNzs1pqsf8oXopdLpsfAXcZOwsRWzg1xwCCwwE631UHaHGx7EsMmPxgPA0cpSw0lO0VwZtc96p6cDpHmEsNHVbv0uZtyJwejtfwlbr5QqAU6ks05UKA8IvnJE7CZdMLdmi3UdwqgtQ7x3v4QeT3POj-mYl8jLVbk%3D) Tennesseans are unemployed, even though there are [249,924](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsenbKlXF3ABoVrLqK7nBcBROtMnkQjd6bMDQn7fq6NGJ7odLxlcLcHlp3Ji1iPO-yJytwujO7-nQYubzSh-JoTpGgPNagBGLsDk-xTTVXj3OJooJIHtFte0achncKV60JZYNwrSsoOr_HG7U9hadBk5iVAcGej-YaveVxsqFh4Ot0g02OrjS4chtuMKRErYaict3-YMgPkRbX0Iwr8nhukICHfDpL76NLl0gCUqYmOsYSNV37BxhEbAwJirwJoQbmnL_ylYi1emSqFYKW_SyIBm3c%3D) available jobs listed on the department’s Jobs4TN recruitment website.
Walking around Tennessee there are no shortage of “[help wanted](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsencJMHaMe4huT5DcgmCgtdSyYS7OFoeO-um4y4th_M5OoVOTK-k__gVcC_wAS_3SGgch4Kf1n9Y5s_QsoH5QEs_Ouap9PrBEXFmt2QC0rl75W_r4ARLuv1NVsDwMhLV3WdRU8xI_r-n8wLYp_spCzts3RJ5yXRJp2tFYqfpSA1xB4jk0L9f2pNsmZ2bbnNn0m4V2aYjIQPQ9FnVJ472z8WH6hVtdXG9L0i7M603Asgps4U43S1jOAnyTtCDclVhMLJTFfv-gEOyQLDikEgs85K1feJDwpoyQZZEU8XewjUg9RYNLMcEDUv6Uru5ae1NRq4K3niSl4bel3LVPBzC-wwIKT43TNyw8bbIdBwh1-XB3cfZB4lg38npXVkxAwOw9YV7tGeqpLYkpStXPJcOUZynP9glgdZ3l4aqhnepJt4xCj)” signs. Some businesses had to [shut down](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsencrrCc4_VzOh6DaCcb8p6JA7Zx-7nfUF4ZfgbSZcBd8ainmktrdkEqbtaaiTYUcGRL_5BHeGsxQXjGzDGsCeXsad9gCUwWT83lEQSbvCGgOB06ZoT2-_BznzCLDFmvnGDK6AoMgStrVXboOubYiJA-MsDA8pJDhyyrlU0IbeHCwdhX_6feurKmQiMH3UpNEolyeUDmamzdzrrE8XBjooJJsQQ_1YXc7XlOebpLHmKye0ijLknlJoeibiazQPFzjzi97NWytW1AGVIAitYzDzC_87MiiD3eeHP9vdfEKIgwjkpLihzkbSOCQuhIekhSlrFh1IAKAwr0-NeCGY1Misys6i2cXVKJjObUrWpMcwOaRH1TTa7r2dHieuOtNvPBxQCg%3D%3D) temporarily due to staffing issues. Others are [increasing](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsenSzA3fuvfc9xF4YN9PAenQYwbHHQu8Udtre_AADbA12G9KrSmVuT4sOWxRlhrunQwHzkWOebzJlcQoSwMiJwY7158_RjK0L-qVqP1ETt5odwi0fTxUtDfYWJgJjAhwYrm46zqSmAhsRbRCKi-F8IrAp8HOCs0qUgXLMx4LC1v8g8si9T1LC--2y0CQi-7Ac16rsyooqM71iXSP0cMNVHA2ClQsyW514NeFLJazNeiBRdJ6tlBIhnUrdEE5_cOlQwTX1t5rfDVEfRLqtHSZ9N_MEsQI2W6ltDHKXMVEpyO2WwpzksW-2DgDn_TSjPB1qMnGqSE85rvuGfs5bgU2ae7u02Dhfqe8yTFME9hY-nedI_2oHE11RnHnR0L8ZaP1C-q4ZC6cIZtxGnIeAwU9XFk9s%3D) wages and offering sign up bonuses, which makes it that much harder for owners to keep their businesses afloat.
Helping our local small businesses thrive is essential to a healthy economy and community. That’s why I’m glad Governor Lee [opted](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsenXuxdEol-16zCS_AFtSLkmXRYsWhILUqfutJCjWlSUeG1nBafqgT9PsdU-NoCOq13s0WJe3AiJlNbqJtmF54vm3VEO_mIuC52CyQlVSOlN3T3IGoCV6t7VeH3bd0GKWOupQ4PXt2CW32ClbZgGFyI0wSFXW9mjsoiGjQSurP437eoXWxzhVU6mtiMKfaa6zUnFcD504lIqJEv-k9jhtGPd91fD_hdr4c3XupBymse1Ym91v0by8uJURDaIEZxEIM7A7UVfhl4xLnTmB0Cewou3c-3cMR5_c7Anpt1gLaWi7-2pCmr170zTUkpCTlVM2vKpBZVBHf4fGdaolaeKYY7KR7KA2TM6jYHD1bIg1G5EaNClNkzvQ_Dz3DdO1nhGBsvHVxYjWLpQFLcSrLhDjbpPE%3D) Tennessee out of receiving continued unemployment benefits. This will help our economy get back on its feet and benefit us all in the long run. | |
---
**Serving Our Veterans 🙏
**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsenUD6XOuMFZjuLRMiU4OA-q5PChkmd6xN-jwjOwdexuERrm35gVYClUrU4Qeu4BkQWdwlzfwkddBj53MuU12exLuGbjg8A-XO7n89lGQWH3fiE7cqXCFTG0KQsLt5YCBamREPuauv3fus2S-mn9JPoLJPneYO9JHrwZYTOgmV74YEHE5BVqm0aR8nvwbcmIMbPsq6U9eqLpDtZlqlK6F8Fcm5hS4dITkpBauh7bpKRHdJDAgLD-xWbjD1ne-micjIV_QmHOuKqq0SnCpaUaaTdb_W9UI9VwiDkHS7etY10FwVveFVl5Wn5g9JztJI8FxB3atBGwTB5qbl6UnJMPw4l2fNZpDXuvd6RCJY2Ti0P9X_bKlJMXrONOQtq8awDUJNQhKZZCXsOvBBTee_gEV1HC2RgLefDHzKgwWFKPWG5GmW)
It’s no secret America has a long way to go in providing services for veterans, and [Cornerstone for Recovery](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsenWd_vun2O-7_B6zd0_r0zLSYyShyrT26Rah7uCqxtbykyRO5RRLzNx_X49yy7NfPfzHdoYQYJ3hr7Mgifc_hz_ZghDgZoU8JiHSSVznqml0ly3vrVsOKLqkrs998oJh0tD1MqRcJDiPvMbsxML66ZCG2oKdAIyNVBQAy5ETxTxZsafQBLrZPqdLIq1O9AJcgxOhhxdshQN_WOmX2JLc5jHpD7CPYroXRH_UeSRl6iQy8z4-jux-aHVejWZUerwxojA%3D%3D) is leading the way. During a [visit](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c6e9502092564fcaabdfe2e2df962242&_e=R9wcQY4msUISGLoh-gsenWd_vun2O-7_B6zd0_r0zLSRWo83mG7_NXf-nn81whixihKMQRjPjkLUEzNhAFqOPtoi_t7H6LgQx7f8jDvTlBJ6iAWrEtfYKvnylj7XcrkHf-FGFrAg88nskZ2ojYM7iwhy4KO4dpM7ow4qN-io8InA7yAiglz8K1xHWmJfx31Ja7svhWwmMvZfSEwZQOy8S1OB8CxTBPupLYFZ-P1Pmqo-ULuq7fnDxMcheDa2NPQE_y-H0p7Cjfh81QEZRKjH-dJoFGQb74idwaOe9ezFNqmKcbxyqZlXgvauGFKwOCOnGXxmdJNp4w95hObkKh50A6de_UMe8a7oEFzWLA1nuw0%3D) to the Blount County facility last week, I learned all about the organization’s work in providing substance abuse treatment. The men and women who served our country deserve our help. It's moving to see an organization that provides that support with genuine care. To the folks at Cornerstone, thanks for having me and keep up your important work!
|

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. The Hiring Struggle is Real ⚠️ When I travel throughout our district, I keep hearing the same frustration from our small business owners: They can’t find workers. Why are they struggling so hard? Because the federal government increased unemployment benefits so much that people could earn more money NOT working than they would working! Honestly, I can’t blame these workers. After a rough year of lockdowns, why would anyone rush back to work when they can earn more money staying home? But that doesn’t mean the federal government should be handing out checks when there are jobs available. That’s why Republicans to limit unemployment benefits as soon as businesses started opening up again. But Democrats got their way, and now, our economy is suffering the consequences. According to the Tennessee Department of Labor and Workforce Development, nearly Tennesseans are unemployed, even though there are available jobs listed on the department’s Jobs4TN recruitment website. Walking around Tennessee there are no shortage of “” signs. Some businesses had to temporarily due to staffing issues. Others are wages and offering sign up bonuses, which makes it that much harder for owners to keep their businesses afloat. Helping our local small businesses thrive is essential to a healthy economy and community. That’s why I’m glad Governor Lee Tennessee out of receiving continued unemployment benefits. This will help our economy get back on its feet and benefit us all in the long run. | | Serving Our Veterans 🙏 It’s no secret America has a long way to go in providing services for veterans, and is leading the way. During a to the Blount County facility last week, I learned all about the organization’s work in providing substance abuse treatment. The men and women who served our country deserve our help. It's moving to see an organization that provides that support with genuine care. To the folks at Cornerstone, thanks for having me and keep up your important work! | Just For Fun 🎉 → This golden retriever offered a helpful hand (paw) to a local groundhog 🐾 () → Law enforcement joined together to help this student’s wish come true 👮 () → Would you take this dive every day? 🏊 () | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Kimberly Fletcher
subject: FoxNews: RI Moms sued for Challenging CRT
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57762751:6a14dvlxN:m:1:3253819041:49884B7C07F4B6A39F66B09BD7E40FC1:r "Headline") Peter: Parents are waking up to the radical left-wing propaganda being taught to our children in schools nationwide, but **_it may already be too late_**. The latest news flash sent a chill down my spine: | _A**school committee in Rhode Island is threatening to sue a woman** for filing... public records requests... The Town of South Kingstown initially demanded a nearly $10,000 bill for records retrieval related to her request for information about the school district's implementation of "critical race and gender curriculum."_
---
These academic activists have the full backing of Joe Biden's Department of Education, and teachers who speak out are being threatened and placed on administrative leave... or worse! **_School boards and administrators are also being taught how to "handle" parents that ask questions about what their children are learning._**
My organization - Moms for America Action - is doing everything we can to stop them. **Thankfully,** _a generous donor has agreed to match 400% of what we raise_ **from this email to help us fight back.**
**[If you donate $10 today, it becomes $40; your investment of $25 becomes $100; and a generous gift of $50 is matched to $200!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57762751:6a14dvlxN:m:1:3253819041:49884B7C07F4B6A39F66B09BD7E40FC1:r "If you donate $10 today, it becomes $40; your investment of $25
becomes $100; and a generous gift of $50 is matched to $200!")**
Your direct investment and support will empower[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57762751:6a14dvlxN:m:1:3253819041:49884B7C07F4B6A39F66B09BD7E40FC1:r "CRT") moms all over the country to take control of what's being taught in the classroom and fight back against left-wing indoctrination, legal threats from entrenched activist school boards and liberal administrators.
**We can 't allow the Marxist-led school boards and teacher unions to trick our children into hating our nation or themselves with OUR Taxpayer money!**
The radical left has spent years implementing their radical curriculum in the classroom and has taken measures to stop parents from interfering with their indoctrination efforts. In fact, while school is out for Summer break, radical left activists are working together to implement a curriculum to **" root out white advantage"** as well as design and implement **' anti-racism'** and **' gender bias'** instruction for children as young as Pre-K in some states!
Moms for America Action is equipping parents with the tools to fight back, but we can't do it without your direct support.
**[Your immediate investment in our mission has 4 TIMES the impact when you contribute through this email before midnight tonight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57762751:6a14dvlxN:m:1:3253819041:49884B7C07F4B6A39F66B09BD7E40FC1:r "Your immediate investment in
our mission has 4 TIMES the impact when you contribute through this email before midnight tonight.")**
We don't have much time. Please donate before midnight.
God bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57762751:6a14dvlxN:m:1:3253819041:49884B7C07F4B6A39F66B09BD7E40FC1:r "Kimberly Fletcher")
Kimberly Fletcher
President & Founder - Moms for America Action
P.S. As you've probably heard, Florida has just become the seventh state in our nation to ban critical race theory in our public schools, but the battle is not even close to finished. We have decades of radical left indoctrination that has filled our schools, and 43 more states to go! **[Help us fight back with YOUR immediate investment of $50, $100, or $500 before midnight tonight!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57762752:6a14dvlxN:m:1:3253819041:49884B7C07F4B6A39F66B09BD7E40FC1:r "Help us fight back with YOUR immediate
investment of $50, $100, or $500 before midnight tonight!")** Thank you.

****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans*****NEW* NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
